# Vježba 3 — Statika fluida {.unnumbered}

Proučavanje fluida u mirovanju, mjerenje tlaka manometrima i ponašanje fluida u sustavima s konstantnim ubrzanjem.

## Fizikalni uvod

Statika fluida proučava fluide u stanju mirovanja. Budući da fluidi u mirovanju ne mogu izdržati tangencijalna naprezanja, sila na bilo koju površinu unutar fluida uvijek je okomita na tu površinu.

1.  **Fundamentalna jednadžba hidrostatike:**
    $$\nabla p = \rho \vec{f}$$
    Za nestlačive fluide u polju gravitacije, integracija daje linearnu raspodjelu tlaka:
    $$p = p_0 + \rho g h$$

2.  **Relativno mirovanje:** Kada se spremnik giba konstantnim ubrzanjem $\vec{a}$, fluid miruje relativno u odnosu na stijenke pod utjecajem efektivne gravitacije:
    $$\vec{g}_{eff} = \vec{g} - \vec{a}$$
    Slobodna površina tekućine postavlja se okomito na vektor $\vec{g}_{eff}$.

3.  **Arhimedov zakon:** Svako tijelo uronjeno u tekućinu gubi na težini onoliko koliko iznosi težina istisnute tekućine:
    $$F_u = \rho_{fluid} \cdot g \cdot V_{istisnut}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<div id="v3-intro-widget" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 20px auto; padding: 22px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-title { margin:0; font-size:1.42rem; color:#0f172a; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:640px; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:240px; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-tabs { display:flex; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-tab { padding:10px 16px; border-radius:999px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; cursor:pointer; background:#edf2f7; color:#475569; font-weight:700; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-scene { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:16px; }
        #v3-intro-widget canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-caption { padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; color:#475569; background:#f8fafc; border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-control, #v3-intro-widget .v3-metric, #v3-intro-widget .v3-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-control { padding:14px 16px; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-control input { width:100%; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-metric { padding:14px; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
        #v3-intro-widget .v3-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
    </style>

    <div class="v3-head">
        <div>
            <div class="v3-kicker">Uvodni laboratorij statike fluida</div>
            <h4 class="v3-title">Dva osnovna motiva poglavlja: balans tlaka i efektivna gravitacija</h4>
            <p class="v3-sub">Prvi dio pokazuje da se u spojnim posudama visine prilagođavaju tako da je tlak u istoj referentnoj ravnini jednak. Drugi dio pokazuje da ubrzani spremnik možemo čitati kao sustav u novom polju sila, pa nagib površine postaje posljedica vektora $\vec{g}_{eff}$.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="v3-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Kratko pravilo</div>
            <div><strong>isti fluid + ista ravnina -> isti tlak</strong></div>
            <div><strong>ubrzanje mijenja orijentaciju slobodne površine</strong></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="v3-tabs">
        <button onclick="switchV3Tab('manometar')" id="v3-btn-mano" class="v3-tab">Manometarski balans</button>
        <button onclick="switchV3Tab('ubrzanje')" id="v3-btn-acc" class="v3-tab">Relativno mirovanje</button>
    </div>

    <div class="v3-scene">
        <canvas id="v3-intro-canvas" width="900" height="360"></canvas>
        <div id="v3-scene-caption" class="v3-caption"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="v3-controls">
        <div id="v3-text-mano" class="v3-control">
            <label>Gustoća fluida 2 (ρ₂): <span id="v3-intro-rho-val" style="color:#2563eb;">1300</span> kg/m³</label>
            <input type="range" id="v3-intro-rho" min="500" max="2000" step="50" value="1300" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div id="v3-text-acc" class="v3-control" style="display:none;">
            <label>Horizontalno ubrzanje aₓ: <span id="v3-intro-acc-val" style="color:#dc2626;">2.5</span> m/s²</label>
            <input type="range" id="v3-intro-acc" min="0" max="10" step="0.5" value="2.5" style="accent-color:#dc2626;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="v3-metrics">
        <div class="v3-metric"><small id="v3-metric-label-1">Visina drugog stupca</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="v3-res-1">0.92</span><span id="v3-unit-1"> m</span></strong></div>
        <div class="v3-metric"><small id="v3-metric-label-2">Tlak u referentnoj ravnini</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="v3-res-2">11.8</span><span id="v3-unit-2"> kPa</span></strong></div>
        <div class="v3-metric"><small id="v3-metric-label-3">Omjer / nagib</small><strong style="color:#c2410c;"><span id="v3-res-3">0.77</span><span id="v3-unit-3"></span></strong></div>
    </div>

    <div class="v3-explainer" id="v3-intro-explainer"></div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v3-intro-canvas');
    if (!canvas) return;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const rhoS = document.getElementById('v3-intro-rho');
    const accS = document.getElementById('v3-intro-acc');
    const sceneCaption = document.getElementById('v3-scene-caption');
    const explainer = document.getElementById('v3-intro-explainer');
    let currentTab = 'manometar';
    let phase = 0;

    window.switchV3Tab = function(tab) {
        currentTab = tab;
        const manoActive = tab === 'manometar';
        document.getElementById('v3-btn-mano').style.background = manoActive ? '#2563eb' : '#edf2f7';
        document.getElementById('v3-btn-mano').style.color = manoActive ? '#ffffff' : '#475569';
        document.getElementById('v3-btn-mano').style.borderColor = manoActive ? '#2563eb' : '#cbd5e1';
        document.getElementById('v3-btn-acc').style.background = manoActive ? '#edf2f7' : '#2563eb';
        document.getElementById('v3-btn-acc').style.color = manoActive ? '#475569' : '#ffffff';
        document.getElementById('v3-btn-acc').style.borderColor = manoActive ? '#cbd5e1' : '#2563eb';
        document.getElementById('v3-text-mano').style.display = manoActive ? 'block' : 'none';
        document.getElementById('v3-text-acc').style.display = manoActive ? 'none' : 'block';
        update();
    };

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        if (label) {
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(label, x2 + 8, y2 + 5);
        }
    }

    function updateMetrics(label1, value1, unit1, label2, value2, unit2, label3, value3, unit3) {
        document.getElementById('v3-metric-label-1').textContent = label1;
        document.getElementById('v3-res-1').textContent = value1;
        document.getElementById('v3-unit-1').textContent = unit1;
        document.getElementById('v3-metric-label-2').textContent = label2;
        document.getElementById('v3-res-2').textContent = value2;
        document.getElementById('v3-unit-2').textContent = unit2;
        document.getElementById('v3-metric-label-3').textContent = label3;
        document.getElementById('v3-res-3').textContent = value3;
        document.getElementById('v3-unit-3').textContent = unit3;
    }

    function drawManometer(rho2) {
        const rho1 = 1000;
        const h1 = 1.2;
        const h2 = h1 * (rho1 / rho2);
        const pref = rho1 * 9.81 * h1 / 1000;
        document.getElementById('v3-intro-rho-val').textContent = rho2.toFixed(0);
        updateMetrics('Visina drugog stupca', h2.toFixed(2), ' m', 'Tlak u referentnoj ravnini', pref.toFixed(2), ' kPa', 'Omjer visina h₂/h₁', (h2 / h1).toFixed(2), '');
        sceneCaption.textContent = 'Promjena gustoće ne mijenja uvjet ravnoteže: tlak u istoj referentnoj ravnini mora ostati jednak s obje strane spojene posude.';
        explainer.textContent = `Za ρ₂ = ${rho2.toFixed(0)} kg/m³ drugi stupac mora imati visinu ${h2.toFixed(2)} m kako bi tlak u zajedničkoj referentnoj ravnini ostao ${pref.toFixed(2)} kPa. Gušći fluid treba manju visinu da bi dao isti hidrostatski tlak.`;

        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        const baseY = 290;
        const leftX = 210;
        const rightX = 560;
        const scale = 120;
        const leftTop = baseY - h1 * scale;
        const rightTop = baseY - h2 * scale;

        ctx.lineWidth = 24;
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#dbeafe';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(leftX, 70);
        ctx.lineTo(leftX, baseY);
        ctx.lineTo(rightX, baseY);
        ctx.lineTo(rightX, 70);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#2563eb';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(leftX, leftTop + Math.sin(phase) * 2);
        ctx.lineTo(leftX, baseY);
        ctx.lineTo(385, baseY);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(385, baseY);
        ctx.lineTo(rightX, baseY);
        ctx.lineTo(rightX, rightTop + Math.sin(phase + 0.8) * 2);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.setLineDash([7, 6]);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#16a34a';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(120, baseY);
        ctx.lineTo(780, baseY);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('referentna ravnina: tlak je jednak s obje strane', 220, baseY + 26);
        ctx.fillText(`ρ₁ = 1000 kg/m³`, 148, leftTop - 18);
        ctx.fillText(`ρ₂ = ${rho2.toFixed(0)} kg/m³`, 520, rightTop - 18);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
        ctx.fillText(`h₁ = ${h1.toFixed(2)} m`, 148, leftTop - 38);
        ctx.fillText(`h₂ = ${h2.toFixed(2)} m`, 520, rightTop - 38);

        drawArrow(305, leftTop + 12, 305, baseY - 10, '#2563eb', 'ρ₁gh₁');
        drawArrow(650, rightTop + 12, 650, baseY - 10, '#334155', 'ρ₂gh₂');
    }

    function drawAcceleration(ax) {
        const g = 9.81;
        const alpha = Math.atan(ax / g);
        const alphaDeg = alpha * 180 / Math.PI;
        const geff = Math.sqrt(g * g + ax * ax);
        const tankL = 2.2;
        const deltaH = tankL * Math.tan(alpha);
        document.getElementById('v3-intro-acc-val').textContent = ax.toFixed(1);
        updateMetrics('Nagib površine', alphaDeg.toFixed(1), '°', 'Efektivna gravitacija', geff.toFixed(2), ' m/s²', 'Razlika razina Δh', deltaH.toFixed(2), ' m');
        sceneCaption.textContent = 'Kad spremnik ubrzava, slobodna površina zauzima položaj okomit na vektor efektivne gravitacije g_eff.';
        explainer.textContent = `Za aₓ = ${ax.toFixed(1)} m/s² rezultantno polje sila više nije okomito prema dolje nego je nagnuto. Zato se slobodna površina naginje za ${alphaDeg.toFixed(1)}°, a preko duljine spremnika od ${tankL.toFixed(1)} m nastaje razlika razina od približno ${deltaH.toFixed(2)} m.`;

        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        const tankX = 160;
        const tankY = 90;
        const tankW = 420;
        const tankH = 190;
        const hMid = tankY + 92;
        const dy = (tankW / 2) * Math.tan(alpha) * 0.35;

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#1f2937';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.strokeRect(tankX, tankY, tankW, tankH);
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(37,99,235,0.16)';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(tankX, hMid + dy + Math.sin(phase) * 2);
        ctx.lineTo(tankX + tankW, hMid - dy + Math.sin(phase + 0.5) * 2);
        ctx.lineTo(tankX + tankW, tankY + tankH);
        ctx.lineTo(tankX, tankY + tankH);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(tankX, hMid);
        ctx.lineTo(tankX + tankW, hMid);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
        ctx.fillText(`α = ${alphaDeg.toFixed(1)}°`, 620, 82);
        ctx.fillText(`Δh ≈ ${deltaH.toFixed(2)} m`, 620, 104);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
        ctx.fillText('isprekidana linija: površina bez ubrzanja', 610, 132);
        ctx.fillText('puna kosa linija: površina u relativnom mirovanju', 610, 152);

        const vx = 710;
        const vy = 220;
        drawArrow(vx, vy, vx, vy + 70, '#64748b', 'g');
        drawArrow(vx, vy, vx - ax * 12, vy, '#dc2626', '-a');
        drawArrow(vx, vy, vx - ax * 12, vy + 70, '#2563eb', 'g_eff');
    }

    function update() {
        if (currentTab === 'manometar') {
            drawManometer(parseFloat(rhoS.value));
        } else {
            drawAcceleration(parseFloat(accS.value));
        }
    }

    function animate() {
        phase += 0.04;
        update();
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    rhoS.addEventListener('input', update);
    accS.addEventListener('input', update);
    window.switchV3Tab('manometar');
    animate();
})();
</script>
```

```{=html}
<style>
    .mf1-widget-toolbar {
        margin-top: 12px;
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 10px;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: flex-end;
    }

    .mf1-reset-btn {
        border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
        background: #f8fafc;
        color: #0f172a;
        border-radius: 999px;
        padding: 8px 14px;
        font-size: 0.78rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.18s ease;
    }

    .mf1-reset-btn:hover {
        background: #e2e8f0;
        border-color: #94a3b8;
    }

    .mf1-reset-btn:focus-visible {
        outline: 2px solid #2563eb;
        outline-offset: 2px;
    }

    .mf1-input-hint {
        color: #475569;
        font-size: 0.72rem;
        font-weight: 600;
    }

    div[id$="-widget"] input[type="range"],
    #v3-intro-widget input[type="range"] {
        cursor: ew-resize;
    }
</style>

<script>
(function() {
    function triggerInputs(root) {
        root.querySelectorAll('input, select').forEach((el) => {
            el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
            el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
        });
    }

    function setupWidget(widget, idx) {
        if (!widget || widget.querySelector('.mf1-widget-toolbar')) return;
        const ranges = Array.from(widget.querySelectorAll('input[type="range"]'));
        const checks = Array.from(widget.querySelectorAll('input[type="checkbox"]'));
        const selects = Array.from(widget.querySelectorAll('select'));
        if (ranges.length === 0 && checks.length === 0 && selects.length === 0) return;

        ranges.forEach((range, rangeIndex) => {
            range.dataset.defaultValue = range.value;
            if (!range.id) range.id = `mf1-auto-range-${idx}-${rangeIndex}`;
            range.title = 'Dvoklik vraca slider na pocetnu vrijednost';
            range.addEventListener('dblclick', () => {
                range.value = range.dataset.defaultValue;
                range.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
            });
            range.addEventListener('keydown', (ev) => {
                if ((ev.key === 'r' || ev.key === 'R') && !ev.ctrlKey && !ev.altKey && !ev.metaKey) {
                    ev.preventDefault();
                    range.value = range.dataset.defaultValue;
                    range.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
                }
            });
        });

        checks.forEach((check) => {
            check.dataset.defaultChecked = check.checked ? '1' : '0';
        });

        selects.forEach((sel) => {
            sel.dataset.defaultValue = sel.value;
        });

        const toolbar = document.createElement('div');
        toolbar.className = 'mf1-widget-toolbar';
        const hint = document.createElement('span');
        hint.className = 'mf1-input-hint';
        hint.textContent = 'Tip: dvoklik na slider resetira samo taj parametar';

        const resetBtn = document.createElement('button');
        resetBtn.type = 'button';
        resetBtn.className = 'mf1-reset-btn';
        resetBtn.textContent = 'Resetiraj widget';
        resetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            ranges.forEach((range) => {
                range.value = range.dataset.defaultValue;
            });
            checks.forEach((check) => {
                check.checked = check.dataset.defaultChecked === '1';
            });
            selects.forEach((sel) => {
                sel.value = sel.dataset.defaultValue;
            });
            triggerInputs(widget);
        });

        toolbar.appendChild(hint);
        toolbar.appendChild(resetBtn);
        widget.appendChild(toolbar);
    }

    function init() {
        const widgets = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#v3-intro-widget, div[id$="-widget"]'));
        widgets.forEach(setupWidget);
    }

    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
    } else {
        init();
    }
})();
</script>
```

```{=html}
<div class="mf1-note-grid">
    <div class="mf1-kriterij">
        <h4>Kriterij primjene</h4>
        <ul>
            <li>Za fluide u mirovanju uvijek računaj tlak kao posljedicu polja sila i geometrije, ne kao posljedicu tangencijalnog strujanja.</li>
            <li>Kod ubrzanih sustava najprije prijeđi na efektivnu gravitaciju $\vec{g}_{eff}$, pa tek onda određuj nagib slobodne površine i raspodjelu tlaka.</li>
        </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="mf1-warning">
        <h4>Česta pogreška</h4>
        <p>Najčešća greška je miješati apsolutni, atmosferski i manometarski tlak ili zaboraviti da tlak u istoj horizontalnoj ravnini vrijedi samo unutar istog kontinuiranog fluida.</p>
    </div>
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z24 — Manometar s više fluida (Prirodni plin) {.unnumbered}

Izmjereni pretlak sustava na slici iznosi 65 kPa. Potrebno je odrediti visinu stupca žive $h_2$. Pretpostavke: Fluid je nestlačiv. Tlak prirodnog plina je uslijed male gustoće jednoliko raspodijeljen u spremniku i u cijevi.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$p_{pm}$ = $65 \, \text{kPa}$, $h_1$ = $0,3 \, \text{m}$, $h_3$ = $0,75 \, \text{m}$, $\bar{\rho}_{Hg}$ = $13,6$, $\bar{\rho}_u$ = $0,72$, $\rho_v$ = $1000 \, \text{kg/m}^3$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$h_2 = ?$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

Postavljamo jednadžbu ravnoteže tlakova:
$$p_{pm} + \rho_v g h_1 - \rho_u g h_3 = \rho_{Hg} g h_2$$

Iz čega slijedi visina stupca žive:
$$h_2 = \frac{p_{pm} + \rho_v g h_1 - \rho_u g h_3}{\rho_{Hg} g}$$
$$h_2 = \frac{65000 + 1000 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,3 - 720 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,75}{13600 \cdot 9,81} = \mathbf{0,469 \, \text{m}}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<div id="widget-z24-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
<style>
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-title { margin:0; font-size:1.42rem; color:#0f172a; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:240px; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-scene { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:16px; }
    #widget-z24-advanced canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-control, #widget-z24-advanced .z24-metric, #widget-z24-advanced .z24-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-control { padding:14px 16px; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-control input { width:100%; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-actions { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; margin-bottom:12px; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-action { border:1px solid #cbd5e1; background:#f8fafc; color:#0f172a; border-radius:999px; padding:7px 12px; font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-action.is-active { background:#2563eb; border-color:#2563eb; color:#ffffff; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-metric { padding:14px; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-status { margin-bottom:12px; padding:10px 12px; border-radius:12px; font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:700; border:1px solid #bfdbfe; background:#eff6ff; color:#1e3a8a; }
    #widget-z24-advanced .z24-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
</style>

<div class="z24-head">
    <div>
        <div class="z24-kicker">Z24 laboratorij balansiranja plina</div>
        <h4 class="z24-title">Visina žive je rezultat natjecanja između tlaka plina i lakših tekućina</h4>
        <p class="z24-sub">Prirodni plin u lijevoj grani gura vodu prema dolje, dok ulje u desnoj grani djeluje u suprotnom smjeru. Živa mora preuzeti ostatak tog neravnotežnog tlaka, pa je najvažnije jasno vidjeti koji članovi povećavaju, a koji smanjuju potrebnu visinu $h_2$.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="z24-note">
        <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Jednadžba</div>
        <div><strong>p_pm + ρ_vgh₁ - ρ_ugh₃ = ρ_Hggh₂</strong></div>
        <div>plin i voda dižu h₂</div>
        <div>ulje ga smanjuje</div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="z24-scene">
    <canvas id="canvas-z24-v3" width="900" height="360"></canvas>
</div>

<div class="z24-controls">
    <div class="z24-control">
        <label>Pretlak plina p_pm: <span id="z24-v3-val-p" style="color:#d97706;">65</span> kPa</label>
        <input type="range" id="z24-v3-slider-p" min="10" max="150" step="1" value="65" style="accent-color:#d97706;">
    </div>
    <div class="z24-control">
        <label>Visina vode h₁: <span id="z24-v3-val-h1" style="color:#2563eb;">0.30</span> m</label>
        <input type="range" id="z24-v3-slider-h1" min="0.1" max="0.8" step="0.01" value="0.30" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
    </div>
    <div class="z24-control">
        <label>Visina ulja h₃: <span id="z24-v3-val-h3" style="color:#b7791f;">0.75</span> m</label>
        <input type="range" id="z24-v3-slider-h3" min="0.2" max="1.8" step="0.01" value="0.75" style="accent-color:#b7791f;">
    </div>
    <div class="z24-control">
        <label>Gustoća vode ρ_v: <span id="z24-v3-val-rhov" style="color:#2563eb;">1000</span> kg/m³</label>
        <input type="range" id="z24-v3-slider-rhov" min="980" max="1040" step="1" value="1000" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
    </div>
    <div class="z24-control">
        <label>Gustoća ulja ρ_u: <span id="z24-v3-val-rhou" style="color:#b7791f;">720</span> kg/m³</label>
        <input type="range" id="z24-v3-slider-rhou" min="650" max="900" step="5" value="720" style="accent-color:#b7791f;">
    </div>
</div>

<div class="z24-actions">
    <button type="button" class="z24-action is-active" data-z24-scenario="default">Bazni primjer</button>
    <button type="button" class="z24-action" data-z24-scenario="high-gas">Visoki tlak plina</button>
    <button type="button" class="z24-action" data-z24-scenario="oil-dominant">Dominira ulje</button>
</div>

<div class="z24-status" id="z24-v3-status">Rezim: uravnotezen standardni slucaj.</div>

<div class="z24-metrics">
    <div class="z24-metric"><small>Potrebna visina žive h₂</small><strong style="color:#6b7280;"><span id="z24-v3-res-h2">0.469</span> m</strong></div>
    <div class="z24-metric"><small>Doprinos plina + vode</small><strong style="color:#2563eb;"><span id="z24-v3-res-rise">67.94</span> kPa</strong></div>
    <div class="z24-metric"><small>Oduzimanje ulja</small><strong style="color:#b7791f;"><span id="z24-v3-res-oil">5.30</span> kPa</strong></div>
    <div class="z24-metric"><small>Ekvivalent tlaka žive</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="z24-v3-res-hgdp">62.64</span> kPa</strong></div>
    <div class="z24-metric"><small>Neto rezerva</small><strong style="color:#7c3aed;"><span id="z24-v3-res-margin">92.2</span> %</strong></div>
</div>

<div class="z24-explainer" id="z24-v3-explainer"></div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z24-v3');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const slP = document.getElementById('z24-v3-slider-p');
    const slH1 = document.getElementById('z24-v3-slider-h1');
    const slH3 = document.getElementById('z24-v3-slider-h3');
    const slRhoV = document.getElementById('z24-v3-slider-rhov');
    const slRhoU = document.getElementById('z24-v3-slider-rhou');
    const scenarioButtons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-z24-scenario]'));
    const statusEl = document.getElementById('z24-v3-status');
    let phase = 0;

    const scenarios = {
        'default': { p: 65, h1: 0.30, h3: 0.75, rhoV: 1000, rhoU: 720 },
        'high-gas': { p: 120, h1: 0.45, h3: 0.60, rhoV: 1000, rhoU: 720 },
        'oil-dominant': { p: 20, h1: 0.20, h3: 1.60, rhoV: 1000, rhoU: 860 }
    };

    function setActiveScenario(name) {
        scenarioButtons.forEach((btn) => {
            btn.classList.toggle('is-active', btn.dataset.z24Scenario === name);
        });
    }

    function applyScenario(name) {
        const cfg = scenarios[name];
        if (!cfg) return;
        slP.value = cfg.p;
        slH1.value = cfg.h1;
        slH3.value = cfg.h3;
        slRhoV.value = cfg.rhoV;
        slRhoU.value = cfg.rhoU;
        setActiveScenario(name);
        update();
    }

    function update() {
        const p = parseFloat(slP.value);
        const h1 = parseFloat(slH1.value);
        const h3 = parseFloat(slH3.value);
        const rhoV = parseFloat(slRhoV.value);
        const rhoU = parseFloat(slRhoU.value);
        const g = 9.81;
        const rhoHg = 13600;
        const rise = p + rhoV * g * h1 / 1000;
        const oilOpposition = rhoU * g * h3 / 1000;
        const hgEquivalent = rise - oilOpposition;
        const h2 = (hgEquivalent * 1000) / (rhoHg * g);
        const marginPct = rise > 0 ? (100 * hgEquivalent / rise) : 0;

        document.getElementById('z24-v3-val-p').textContent = p.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z24-v3-val-h1').textContent = h1.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z24-v3-val-h3').textContent = h3.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z24-v3-val-rhov').textContent = rhoV.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z24-v3-val-rhou').textContent = rhoU.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z24-v3-res-h2').textContent = h2.toFixed(3);
        document.getElementById('z24-v3-res-rise').textContent = rise.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z24-v3-res-oil').textContent = oilOpposition.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z24-v3-res-hgdp').textContent = hgEquivalent.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z24-v3-res-margin').textContent = marginPct.toFixed(1);

        if (hgEquivalent < 0) {
            statusEl.textContent = 'Rezim: uljni stupac nadvladava pogonski tlak i trazeni smjer stupca zive se obrce.';
            statusEl.style.background = '#fef2f2';
            statusEl.style.borderColor = '#fecaca';
            statusEl.style.color = '#991b1b';
        } else if (h2 > 0.7) {
            statusEl.textContent = 'Rezim: potrebna je velika visina zive, sustav je blizu mjernog limita laboratorijskog manometra.';
            statusEl.style.background = '#fff7ed';
            statusEl.style.borderColor = '#fdba74';
            statusEl.style.color = '#9a3412';
        } else if (marginPct < 15) {
            statusEl.textContent = 'Rezim: gotovo uravnotezeno, mali pomak parametara lako mijenja potrebnu visinu zive.';
            statusEl.style.background = '#f5f3ff';
            statusEl.style.borderColor = '#ddd6fe';
            statusEl.style.color = '#5b21b6';
        } else {
            statusEl.textContent = 'Rezim: uravnotezen standardni slucaj.';
            statusEl.style.background = '#eff6ff';
            statusEl.style.borderColor = '#bfdbfe';
            statusEl.style.color = '#1e3a8a';
        }

        document.getElementById('z24-v3-explainer').textContent = `Pretlak plina od ${p.toFixed(0)} kPa i vodeni stupac ${h1.toFixed(2)} m (ρ_v=${rhoV.toFixed(0)} kg/m³) zajedno daju ${rise.toFixed(2)} kPa. Ulje (ρ_u=${rhoU.toFixed(0)} kg/m³) oduzima ${oilOpposition.toFixed(2)} kPa, pa živa preuzima ${hgEquivalent.toFixed(2)} kPa. Zato je potrebna visina žive h₂ = ${h2.toFixed(3)} m.`;

        draw(p, h1, h2, h3, rise, oilOpposition);
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        if (label) {
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(label, x2 + 8, y2 + 4);
        }
    }

    function draw(p, h1, h2, h3, rise, oilOpposition) {
        phase += 0.04;
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const tankX = 60;
        const tankY = 65;
        const tankW = 180;
        const tankH = 120;
        const ox = 340;
        const baseY = 300;
        const scale = 180;

        ctx.fillStyle = '#fef3c7';
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#d97706';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.roundRect(tankX, tankY, tankW, tankH, 18);
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = '#92400e';
        ctx.font = 'bold 14px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('PRIRODNI PLIN', tankX + 34, tankY + 28);
        ctx.fillText(`p_pm = ${p.toFixed(0)} kPa`, tankX + 46, tankY + 50);
        for (let i = 0; i < 18; i += 1) {
            const px = tankX + 20 + (i % 6) * 26 + Math.sin(phase + i) * 3;
            const py = tankY + 40 + Math.floor(i / 6) * 24 + Math.cos(phase + i) * 3;
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(217,119,6,0.45)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(px, py, 2.4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#fde68a';
        ctx.lineWidth = 20;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(tankX + tankW, tankY + tankH / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(ox, tankY + tankH / 2);
        ctx.stroke();

        const y1Start = tankY + tankH / 2;
        const y1End = y1Start + h1 * scale;
        const ox2 = ox + 130;
        const y2End = baseY - h2 * scale;
        const y3End = y2End - h3 * scale;
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
        ctx.lineWidth = 18;

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#2563eb';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox, y1Start);
        ctx.lineTo(ox, y1End);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#6b7280';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox, y1End);
        ctx.lineTo(ox, baseY);
        ctx.lineTo(ox2, baseY);
        ctx.lineTo(ox2, y2End);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#d69e2e';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox2, y2End);
        ctx.lineTo(ox2, y3End);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('voda', ox - 16, y1End + 26);
        ctx.fillText('živa', ox2 - 16, baseY + 26);
        ctx.fillText('ulje', ox2 + 18, y3End + 6);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444';
        ctx.fillText('p_atm', ox2 - 10, y3End - 16);

        drawArrow(700, 85, 700, 130, '#2563eb', `+${rise.toFixed(1)} kPa`);
        drawArrow(760, 180, 760, 135, '#b7791f', `-${oilOpposition.toFixed(1)} kPa`);
        drawArrow(820, 130, 820, 220, '#6b7280', `h₂ = ${h2.toFixed(3)} m`);
    }

    [slP, slH1, slH3, slRhoV, slRhoU].forEach((slider) => slider.addEventListener('input', () => {
        setActiveScenario('');
        update();
    }));
    scenarioButtons.forEach((btn) => btn.addEventListener('click', () => applyScenario(btn.dataset.z24Scenario)));
    applyScenario('default');
})();
</script>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Ravnoteža se postiže kada stupac žive ($h_2$) balansira tlak plina, težinu vode i suprotni uzgon stupca ulja ($h_3$).
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

<hr class='zadatak-sep'>

### Zadatak Z25 — Ravnoteža klipa i tlak u komorama {.unnumbered}

Dvije komore koje međusobno povezuje istovrstan fluid (voda gustoće $\rho_v$) odvojene su međusobno putem klipa čija težina iznosi 25 N, prikazano na slici. Potrebno je odrediti pretlak u komorama A i B. Zanemariti utjecaj visine stupca zraka.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$G_k$ = $25 \, \text{N}$, $\rho_v$ = $1000 \, \text{kg/m}^3$, $d_1$ = $0,3 \, \text{m}$, $h_1$ = $0,25 \, \text{m}$, $h_2$ = $0,5 \, \text{m}$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$p_A = ?$; $p_B = ?$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1. **Pretlak pod klipom:**
$$p_c^* = \frac{G_k}{A_k} = \frac{G_k}{d_1^2 \cdot \pi / 4} = \frac{25}{0,0707} = \mathbf{353,6 \, \text{Pa}}$$

2. **Pretlak u komori A:**
$$p_A^* = p_c^* + \rho_v g h_1 = 353,6 + 1000 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,25 = \mathbf{2806 \, \text{Pa}}$$

3. **Pretlak u komori B:**
$$p_B^* = p_c^* - \rho_v g (h_2 - h_1) = 353,6 - 1000 \cdot 9,81 \cdot (0,5 - 0,25) = \mathbf{-2099 \, \text{Pa}}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<div id="widget-z25-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #widget-z25-advanced .z25-head, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-head, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #widget-z25-advanced .z25-kicker, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-kicker, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z25-advanced .z25-title, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-title, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-title { margin:0; font-size:1.42rem; color:#0f172a; }
        #widget-z25-advanced .z25-sub, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-sub, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
        #widget-z25-advanced .z25-note, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-note, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:230px; }
        #widget-z25-advanced .z25-scene, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-scene, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-scene { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:16px; }
        #widget-z25-advanced canvas, #widget-z26-advanced canvas, #widget-z27-advanced canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
        #widget-z25-advanced .z25-controls, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-controls, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z25-advanced .z25-control, #widget-z25-advanced .z25-metric, #widget-z25-advanced .z25-explainer,
        #widget-z26-advanced .z26-control, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-metric, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-explainer,
        #widget-z27-advanced .z27-control, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-metric, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
        #widget-z25-advanced .z25-control, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-control, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-control { padding:14px 16px; }
        #widget-z25-advanced .z25-control label, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-control label, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
        #widget-z25-advanced .z25-control input, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-control input, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-control input { width:100%; }
        #widget-z25-advanced .z25-metrics, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-metrics, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z25-advanced .z25-metric, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-metric, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-metric { padding:14px; }
        #widget-z25-advanced .z25-metric small, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-metric small, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z25-advanced .z25-metric strong, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-metric strong, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
        #widget-z25-advanced .z25-explainer, #widget-z26-advanced .z26-explainer, #widget-z27-advanced .z27-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
    </style>
    <div class="z25-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z25-kicker">Z25 laboratorij klipa</div>
            <h4 class="z25-title">Težina klipa prvo stvara bazni tlak, a tek onda visine određuju komore A i B</h4>
            <p class="z25-sub">Ovdje je najvažnije ne preskočiti međukorak. Klip ne stvara odmah tlak u komorama, nego najprije stvara pretlak $p_c = G_k/A_k$ ispod sebe. Tek se taj bazni tlak prenosi kroz vodu i korigira zbog visinskih razlika do komora A i B.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z25-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Lanac</div>
            <div><strong>G_k -> A_k -> p_c</strong></div>
            <div><strong>p_A = p_c + ρgh₁</strong></div>
            <div><strong>p_B = p_c - ρg(h₂-h₁)</strong></div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z25-scene"><canvas id="canvas-z25-v3" width="900" height="360"></canvas></div>
    <div class="z25-controls">
        <div class="z25-control">
            <label>Težina klipa Gₖ: <span id="z25-v3-val-g" style="color:#dc2626;">25</span> N</label>
            <input type="range" id="z25-v3-slider-g" min="5" max="300" step="5" value="25" style="accent-color:#dc2626;">
        </div>
        <div class="z25-control">
            <label>Promjer klipa d: <span id="z25-v3-val-d" style="color:#2563eb;">300</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z25-v3-slider-d" min="150" max="600" step="10" value="300" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z25-metrics">
        <div class="z25-metric"><small>Bazni tlak p_c</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="z25-v3-res-pc">0.354</span> kPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z25-metric"><small>Pretlak u A</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z25-v3-res-pA">2.81</span> kPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z25-metric"><small>Pretlak u B</small><strong style="color:#7c3aed;"><span id="z25-v3-res-pB">-2.10</span> kPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z25-metric"><small>Stanje komore B</small><strong style="color:#b45309;" id="z25-v3-res-state">vakuumski režim</strong></div>
    </div>
    <div class="z25-explainer" id="z25-v3-explainer"></div>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z25-v3');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slG = document.getElementById('z25-v3-slider-g');
        const slD = document.getElementById('z25-v3-slider-d');

        function update() {
            const G = parseFloat(slG.value);
            const dMm = parseFloat(slD.value);
            const d = dMm / 1000;
            const area = Math.PI * d * d / 4;
            const rho = 1000;
            const g = 9.81;
            const h1 = 0.25;
            const h2 = 0.5;
            const pc = G / area;
            const pA = pc + rho * g * h1;
            const pB = pc - rho * g * (h2 - h1);

            document.getElementById('z25-v3-val-g').textContent = G.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z25-v3-val-d').textContent = dMm.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z25-v3-res-pc').textContent = (pc / 1000).toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z25-v3-res-pA').textContent = (pA / 1000).toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z25-v3-res-pB').textContent = (pB / 1000).toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z25-v3-res-state').textContent = pB < 0 ? 'vakuumski režim' : 'pozitivan pretlak';
            document.getElementById('z25-v3-explainer').textContent = `Klip težine ${G.toFixed(0)} N i promjera ${dMm.toFixed(0)} mm stvara bazni tlak ${(pc / 1000).toFixed(3)} kPa. Dodavanjem hidrostatskog stupca do komore A dobivaš ${(pA / 1000).toFixed(2)} kPa, dok komora B ostaje na ${(pB / 1000).toFixed(2)} kPa jer je geodetski viša od razine ispod klipa.`;
            draw(G, dMm, pA, pB, pc);
        }

        function draw(G, dMm, pA, pB, pc) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const cx = 430;
            const cy = 180;
            const tubeW = dMm * 0.36;
            const leftBoxY = 245;
            const rightBoxY = 80;

            ctx.fillStyle = '#eff6ff';
            ctx.fillRect(90, leftBoxY, 120, 90);
            ctx.fillStyle = pB < 0 ? '#faf5ff' : '#f0fdf4';
            ctx.fillRect(690, rightBoxY, 120, 90);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#334155';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.strokeRect(90, leftBoxY, 120, 90);
            ctx.strokeRect(690, rightBoxY, 120, 90);

            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(37,99,235,0.22)';
            ctx.fillRect(cx - tubeW / 2, cy, tubeW, 120);
            ctx.fillRect(210, cy + 90, cx - tubeW / 2 - 210, 30);
            ctx.fillRect(cx + tubeW / 2, cy + 90, 690 - (cx + tubeW / 2), 30);
            ctx.fillRect(90, cy + 90, 120, 30);
            ctx.fillRect(690, rightBoxY + 60, 120, 30);
            ctx.fillRect(690, rightBoxY + 60, 30, 150);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#1f2937';
            ctx.lineWidth = 4;
            ctx.strokeRect(cx - tubeW / 2, 40, tubeW, 260);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(210, cy + 105);
            ctx.lineTo(690, cy + 105);
            ctx.stroke();

            const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(cx - tubeW / 2, 0, cx + tubeW / 2, 0);
            grad.addColorStop(0, '#64748b');
            grad.addColorStop(0.5, '#e2e8f0');
            grad.addColorStop(1, '#475569');
            ctx.fillStyle = grad;
            ctx.fillRect(cx - tubeW / 2 + 2, cy - 18, tubeW - 4, 36);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.strokeRect(cx - tubeW / 2 + 2, cy - 18, tubeW - 4, 36);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('A', 145, leftBoxY + 52);
            ctx.fillText('B', 744, rightBoxY + 52);
            ctx.fillText(`p_c = ${(pc / 1000).toFixed(3)} kPa`, 520, 42);
            ctx.fillText(`p_A = ${(pA / 1000).toFixed(2)} kPa`, 74, leftBoxY - 12);
            ctx.fillText(`p_B = ${(pB / 1000).toFixed(2)} kPa`, 668, rightBoxY - 12);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#dc2626';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#dc2626';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx, cy - 36);
            ctx.lineTo(cx, 84);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx - 8, 94);
            ctx.lineTo(cx, 84);
            ctx.lineTo(cx + 8, 94);
            ctx.fill();
        }

        [slG, slD].forEach((slider) => slider.addEventListener('input', update));
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Klip stvara bazni pretlak $p_c = G_k/A_k$. Zbog visinske razlike $h_1$ i $h_2$, tlak u komori A je veći, dok u B može nastupiti vakuum.
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

<hr class='zadatak-sep'>

### Zadatak Z30 — Areometar {.unnumbered}

Gustoću tekućine potrebno je odrediti starim areometrom prikazanim na slici čiji promjer iznosi $d = 1 \, \text{cm}$, a oznake su potpuno izblijedile. Areometar se prvo uranja u vodu, pri čemu se obilježava mjesto na kojemu areometar izvire iz vode. Potom se areometar ubacuje u drugu tekućinu, te se primjećuje da je očitanje sada na mjestu koje je za $h_2 = 0,5 \, \text{cm}$ geodetski više od prethodnog očitanja. Ukoliko je visina očitanja od dna areometra do oznake za vodu iznosila $h_1 = 10 \, \text{cm}$, potrebno je odrediti gustoću druge tekućine.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$d$ = $0,01 \, \text{m}$, $h_1$ = $0,1 \, \text{m}$, $h_2$ = $0,005 \, \text{m}$, $\rho_v$ = $1000 \, \text{kg/m}^3$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">gustoću tekućine $\rho_? = ?$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

Iz Arhimedova zakona slijedi da je težina areometra jednaka težini istisnute tekućine. Budući da areometar pliva u oba slučaja:
$$\rho_v \cdot V_v = \rho_? \cdot V_?$$
$$\rho_v \cdot A \cdot h_1 = \rho_? \cdot A \cdot (h_1 - h_2)$$

Gustoća nepoznate tekućine:
$$\rho_? = \rho_v \cdot \frac{h_1}{h_1 - h_2}$$
$$\rho_? = 1000 \cdot \frac{0,1}{0,1 - 0,005} = \mathbf{1052,6 \, \text{kg/m}^3}$$

```{=html}
<div id="widget-z30-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <div class="z30-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z30-kicker">Z30 laboratorij areometra</div>
            <h4 class="z30-title">Mjerenje gustoće ne kreće od ρ, nego od opaženog pomaka oznake h₂</h4>
            <p class="z30-sub">Pedagoški je korisnije prvo pomicati opaženu razliku očitanja, a tek zatim iz nje računati gustoću nepoznate tekućine. Tako student direktno vidi kako se Arhimedov zakon prevodi u relaciju $ρ_? = ρ_v h_1 / (h_1 - h_2)$.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z30-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Ravnoteža</div>
            <div><strong>ρ_v A h₁ = ρ_? A(h₁-h₂)</strong></div>
            <div>veći pozitivni h₂ -> gušća tekućina</div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z30-scene"><canvas id="z30-canvas" width="900" height="360"></canvas></div>
    <div class="z30-controls">
        <div class="z30-control">
            <label>Opaženi pomak očitanja h₂: <span id="z30-v-h2" style="color:#dc2626;">5.0</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z30-h2" min="-20" max="20" step="0.5" value="5" style="accent-color:#dc2626;">
        </div>
        <div class="z30-control">
            <label>Referentno uranjanje u vodi h₁: <span id="z30-v-h1" style="color:#2563eb;">100</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z30-h1" min="60" max="160" step="2" value="100" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div class="z30-control">
            <label>Nesigurnost očitanja ±: <span id="z30-v-sigma" style="color:#7c3aed;">1.0</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z30-sigma" min="0" max="4" step="0.1" value="1.0" style="accent-color:#7c3aed;">
        </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; margin-bottom:12px;">
        <button type="button" id="z30-preset-light" style="border:1px solid #cbd5e1; background:#f8fafc; color:#0f172a; border-radius:999px; padding:7px 12px; font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer;">Laksa od vode</button>
        <button type="button" id="z30-preset-neutral" style="border:1px solid #cbd5e1; background:#f8fafc; color:#0f172a; border-radius:999px; padding:7px 12px; font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer;">Blizu vode</button>
        <button type="button" id="z30-preset-heavy" style="border:1px solid #cbd5e1; background:#f8fafc; color:#0f172a; border-radius:999px; padding:7px 12px; font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer;">Gusca od vode</button>
    </div>
    <div id="z30-status-band" style="margin-bottom:12px; padding:10px 12px; border-radius:12px; font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:700; border:1px solid #bfdbfe; background:#eff6ff; color:#1e3a8a;">Rezim: gustoća je blizu gustoće vode.</div>
    <div class="z30-metrics">
        <div class="z30-metric"><small>Gustoća nepoznate tekućine</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z30-v-rho">1052.6</span> kg/m³</strong></div>
        <div class="z30-metric"><small>Interval gustoće</small><strong style="color:#6d28d9;"><span id="z30-rho-range">1040 - 1066</span> kg/m³</strong></div>
        <div class="z30-metric"><small>Uronjeno u vodi</small><strong style="color:#2563eb;"><span id="z30-res-hwater">100</span> mm</strong></div>
        <div class="z30-metric"><small>Uronjeno u nepoznatoj tekućini</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="z30-res-hfluid">95</span> mm</strong></div>
        <div class="z30-metric"><small>Omjer prema vodi</small><strong style="color:#7c3aed;"><span id="z30-ratio">1.05</span>x</strong></div>
        <div class="z30-metric"><small>Interpretacija</small><strong style="color:#b45309;" id="z30-status">gušća od vode</strong></div>
    </div>
    <div class="z30-explainer" id="z30-explainer"></div>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('z30-canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const h2S = document.getElementById('z30-h2');
        const h1S = document.getElementById('z30-h1');
        const sigmaS = document.getElementById('z30-sigma');
        const bandEl = document.getElementById('z30-status-band');

        function setPreset(h2Value, h1Value) {
            h2S.value = h2Value;
            h1S.value = h1Value;
            update();
        }

        function update() {
            const h2 = parseFloat(h2S.value);
            const h1 = parseFloat(h1S.value);
            const sigma = parseFloat(sigmaS.value);
            const submerged = h1 - h2;
            const safeSubmerged = Math.max(submerged, 0.5);
            const rho = 1000 * h1 / safeSubmerged;
            const ratio = rho / 1000;
            const subLow = Math.max(h1 - (h2 + sigma), 0.5);
            const subHigh = Math.max(h1 - (h2 - sigma), 0.5);
            const rhoHigh = 1000 * h1 / subLow;
            const rhoLow = 1000 * h1 / subHigh;

            document.getElementById('z30-v-h2').textContent = h2.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z30-v-h1').textContent = h1.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z30-v-sigma').textContent = sigma.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z30-v-rho').textContent = rho.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z30-rho-range').textContent = `${rhoLow.toFixed(0)} - ${rhoHigh.toFixed(0)}`;
            document.getElementById('z30-res-hwater').textContent = h1.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z30-res-hfluid').textContent = safeSubmerged.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z30-ratio').textContent = ratio.toFixed(3);
            const status = h2 > 0 ? 'gušća od vode' : (h2 < 0 ? 'rjeđa od vode' : 'jednaka vodi');
            document.getElementById('z30-status').textContent = status;
            if (submerged <= 0.5) {
                bandEl.textContent = 'Rezim: geometrijska granica areometra (h₁ - h₂ ≈ 0). U tom području model postaje nestabilan.';
                bandEl.style.background = '#fef2f2';
                bandEl.style.borderColor = '#fecaca';
                bandEl.style.color = '#991b1b';
            } else if (Math.abs(ratio - 1) < 0.03) {
                bandEl.textContent = 'Rezim: gustoća je gotovo jednaka vodi, zato su i uranjanja vrlo slicna.';
                bandEl.style.background = '#eff6ff';
                bandEl.style.borderColor = '#bfdbfe';
                bandEl.style.color = '#1e3a8a';
            } else if (ratio > 1) {
                bandEl.textContent = 'Rezim: tekucina je osjetno gušća od vode, areometar pluta plice.';
                bandEl.style.background = '#ecfdf5';
                bandEl.style.borderColor = '#86efac';
                bandEl.style.color = '#166534';
            } else {
                bandEl.textContent = 'Rezim: tekucina je osjetno rjeđa od vode, areometar tone dublje.';
                bandEl.style.background = '#fff7ed';
                bandEl.style.borderColor = '#fdba74';
                bandEl.style.color = '#9a3412';
            }
            document.getElementById('z30-explainer').textContent = `Ako je očitanje u drugoj tekućini ${h2.toFixed(1)} mm više nego u vodi, areometar uranja ${safeSubmerged.toFixed(1)} mm. Iz jednakosti uzgona slijedi gustoća ${rho.toFixed(1)} kg/m³, pa je tekućina ${status}. Uz nesigurnost ±${sigma.toFixed(1)} mm, gustoća je u intervalu ${rhoLow.toFixed(0)} do ${rhoHigh.toFixed(0)} kg/m³.`;
            draw(h1, safeSubmerged, h2, rho);
        }

        function draw(hWater, hFluid, h2, rho) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const surfaceY = 130;
            const scale = 1.45;
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(96,165,250,0.18)';
            ctx.fillRect(80, surfaceY, 240, 180);
            ctx.fillStyle = rho > 1000 ? 'rgba(34,197,94,0.15)' : 'rgba(251,146,60,0.16)';
            ctx.fillRect(560, surfaceY, 240, 180);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#334155';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.strokeRect(80, 70, 240, 240);
            ctx.strokeRect(560, 70, 240, 240);
            drawHydrometer(200, surfaceY, hWater * scale, '#cbd5e1', 'voda');
            drawHydrometer(680, surfaceY, hFluid * scale, '#f8fafc', 'nepoznata');

            const markWater = surfaceY - (190 - hWater * scale);
            const markFluid = surfaceY - (190 - hFluid * scale);
            ctx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#dc2626';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(200, markWater);
            ctx.lineTo(680, markWater);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#dc2626';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(730, markWater);
            ctx.lineTo(730, markFluid);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillStyle = '#dc2626';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`h₂ = ${h2.toFixed(1)} mm`, 742, (markWater + markFluid) / 2);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.fillText(`ρ = ${rho.toFixed(1)} kg/m³`, 616, 42);
        }

        function drawHydrometer(x, surfaceY, immersed, color, label) {
            const total = 190;
            const topY = surfaceY - (total - immersed);
            ctx.fillStyle = color;
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x - 8, topY);
            ctx.lineTo(x + 8, topY);
            ctx.lineTo(x + 8, surfaceY + immersed - 44);
            ctx.lineTo(x + 24, surfaceY + immersed - 34);
            ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + 24, surfaceY + immersed, x, surfaceY + immersed);
            ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x - 24, surfaceY + immersed, x - 24, surfaceY + immersed - 34);
            ctx.lineTo(x - 8, surfaceY + immersed - 44);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(label, x - 22, surfaceY + 198);
        }

        [h2S, h1S, sigmaS].forEach((slider) => slider.addEventListener('input', update));
        document.getElementById('z30-preset-light').addEventListener('click', () => setPreset(-12, 100));
        document.getElementById('z30-preset-neutral').addEventListener('click', () => setPreset(0, 100));
        document.getElementById('z30-preset-heavy').addEventListener('click', () => setPreset(12, 100));
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

<hr class='zadatak-sep'>

### Zadatak Z31 — Ubrzanje spremnika - Orijentacija {.unnumbered}

Spremnik pravokutnog presjeka visine 80 cm, tlocrtnih dimenzija 2 m x 0,6 m, napunjen je vodom. Potrebno ga je transportirati vozilom koje jednoliko ubrzava od stanja mirovanja do brzine od 90 km/h u vremenu od 10 s. Potrebno je odrediti dopuštenu inicijalnu visinu vode u spremniku pri kojoj neće doći do prelijevanja. Također, odredite koja je orijentacija spremnika naspram smjera vožnje povoljnija.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$h_s$ = $0,8 \, \text{m}$, $l$ = $2,0 \, \text{m}$, $b$ = $0,6 \, \text{m}$, $v_k$ = $90 \, \text{km/h} = 25 \, \text{m/s}$, $\Delta t$ = $10 \, \text{s}$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$h_{vmax; l \times b} = ?$; $h_{vmax; b \times l} = ?$; povoljnija orijentacija</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

Ubrzanje vozila:
$$a_x = \frac{v_k - v_0}{\Delta t} = \frac{25 - 0}{10} = \mathbf{2,5 \, \text{m/s}^2}$$

Nagib slobodne površine:
$$\tan \alpha = \frac{a_x}{g} = \frac{2,5}{9,81} = 0,2548$$

Maksimalna visina punjenja:
$$h_{max} = h_s - \Delta h = h_s - \frac{L}{2} \tan \alpha$$

1. **Orijentacija dužom stranom u smjeru vožnje ($L = 2,0 \, \text{m}$):**
$$h_{vmax} = 0,8 - \frac{2,0}{2} \cdot 0,2548 = \mathbf{0,545 \, \text{m}}$$

2. **Orijentacija kraćom stranom u smjeru vožnje ($L = 0,6 \, \text{m}$):**
$$h_{vmax} = 0,8 - \frac{0,6}{2} \cdot 0,2548 = \mathbf{0,724 \, \text{m}}$$

**Zaključak:** Povoljnije je transportirati spremnik tako da je kraća stranica paralelna sa smjerom vožnje jer dopušta veći nivo punjenja.

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<div id="widget-z31-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-head, #widget-z32-advanced .z32-head, #widget-z33-advanced .z33-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-kicker, #widget-z32-advanced .z32-kicker, #widget-z33-advanced .z33-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-title, #widget-z32-advanced .z32-title, #widget-z33-advanced .z33-title { margin:0; font-size:1.42rem; color:#0f172a; }
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-sub, #widget-z32-advanced .z32-sub, #widget-z33-advanced .z33-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-note, #widget-z32-advanced .z32-note, #widget-z33-advanced .z33-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:230px; }
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-controls, #widget-z31-advanced .z31-metrics,
        #widget-z32-advanced .z32-controls, #widget-z32-advanced .z32-metrics,
        #widget-z33-advanced .z33-controls, #widget-z33-advanced .z33-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-control, #widget-z31-advanced .z31-metric, #widget-z31-advanced .z31-explainer,
        #widget-z32-advanced .z32-control, #widget-z32-advanced .z32-metric, #widget-z32-advanced .z32-explainer,
        #widget-z33-advanced .z33-control, #widget-z33-advanced .z33-metric, #widget-z33-advanced .z33-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-control, #widget-z32-advanced .z32-control, #widget-z33-advanced .z33-control { padding:14px 16px; }
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-control label, #widget-z32-advanced .z32-control label, #widget-z33-advanced .z33-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-control input, #widget-z32-advanced .z32-control input, #widget-z33-advanced .z33-control input { width:100%; }
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-metric, #widget-z32-advanced .z32-metric, #widget-z33-advanced .z33-metric { padding:14px; }
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-metric small, #widget-z32-advanced .z32-metric small, #widget-z33-advanced .z33-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-metric strong, #widget-z32-advanced .z32-metric strong, #widget-z33-advanced .z33-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-scene, #widget-z32-advanced .z32-scene, #widget-z33-advanced .z33-scene { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:16px; }
        #widget-z31-advanced canvas, #widget-z32-advanced canvas, #widget-z33-advanced canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-compare { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:16px; padding:14px; }
        #widget-z31-advanced .z31-explainer, #widget-z32-advanced .z32-explainer, #widget-z33-advanced .z33-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
        #widget-z33-advanced .z33-action { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:100%; padding:11px 14px; border-radius:12px; border:1px solid #fecaca; background:#fff1f2; color:#be123c; font-weight:800; cursor:pointer; }
    </style>
    <div class="z31-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z31-kicker">Z31 laboratorij orijentacije</div>
            <h4 class="z31-title">Isto ubrzanje daje isti kut površine, ali ne i isti dopušteni nivo punjenja</h4>
            <p class="z31-sub">Ovaj zadatak je najpoučniji kada se odvoji ono što ovisi o ubrzanju od onoga što ovisi o geometriji. Kut nagiba ovisi samo o omjeru $a_x/g$, dok rizik od prelijevanja ovisi o duljini spremnika u smjeru gibanja.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z31-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Ključ</div>
            <div><strong>tan α = a_x / g</strong></div>
            <div><strong>h_vmax = h_s - L tanα / 2</strong></div>
            <div>kraći L daje veći dopušteni početni nivo</div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z31-controls">
        <div class="z31-control">
            <label>Ubrzanje vozila aₓ: <span id="z31-v3-val-ax" style="color:#2563eb;">2.5</span> m/s²</label>
            <input type="range" id="z31-v3-slider-ax" min="0" max="6" step="0.1" value="2.5" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div class="z31-control">
            <label>Planirani početni nivo punjenja: <span id="z31-v3-val-hi" style="color:#dc2626;">0.55</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z31-v3-slider-hi" min="0.2" max="0.8" step="0.01" value="0.55" style="accent-color:#dc2626;">
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z31-metrics">
        <div class="z31-metric"><small>Kut površine α</small><strong style="color:#0f172a;"><span id="z31-v3-res-alpha">14.3</span>°</strong></div>
        <div class="z31-metric"><small>Dopušteni nivo za L=2.0 m</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z31-v3-hlong">0.545</span> m</strong></div>
        <div class="z31-metric"><small>Dopušteni nivo za L=0.6 m</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="z31-v3-hshort">0.724</span> m</strong></div>
        <div class="z31-metric"><small>Povoljnija orijentacija</small><strong style="color:#b45309;" id="z31-v3-better">kraća strana naprijed</strong></div>
    </div>
    <div class="z31-compare">
        <div class="z31-card">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#0f172a; margin-bottom:6px;">Duga strana u smjeru gibanja</div>
            <canvas id="canvas-z31-v3-long" width="420" height="220"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div class="z31-card">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#0f172a; margin-bottom:6px;">Kratka strana u smjeru gibanja</div>
            <canvas id="canvas-z31-v3-short" width="420" height="220"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z31-explainer" id="z31-v3-explainer"></div>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const slAx = document.getElementById('z31-v3-slider-ax');
        const slHi = document.getElementById('z31-v3-slider-hi');
        const cLong = document.getElementById('canvas-z31-v3-long');
        const cShort = document.getElementById('canvas-z31-v3-short');
        const ctxL = cLong.getContext('2d');
        const ctxS = cShort.getContext('2d');

        function update() {
            const ax = parseFloat(slAx.value);
            const hInit = parseFloat(slHi.value);
            const g = 9.81;
            const alpha = Math.atan(ax / g);
            const alphaDeg = alpha * 180 / Math.PI;
            const hTank = 0.8;
            const longMax = hTank - (2.0 / 2) * Math.tan(alpha);
            const shortMax = hTank - (0.6 / 2) * Math.tan(alpha);

            document.getElementById('z31-v3-val-ax').textContent = ax.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z31-v3-val-hi').textContent = hInit.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z31-v3-res-alpha').textContent = alphaDeg.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z31-v3-hlong').textContent = longMax.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z31-v3-hshort').textContent = shortMax.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z31-v3-better').textContent = shortMax > longMax ? 'kraća strana naprijed' : 'duža strana naprijed';
            document.getElementById('z31-v3-explainer').textContent = `Za ubrzanje ${ax.toFixed(1)} m/s² slobodna površina zatvara kut ${alphaDeg.toFixed(1)}°. Ako spremnik puniš do ${hInit.toFixed(2)} m, orijentacija s duljinom 2.0 m dopušta najviše ${longMax.toFixed(3)} m, dok orijentacija s duljinom 0.6 m dopušta ${shortMax.toFixed(3)} m. Zato je kraća stranica u smjeru gibanja sigurnija.`;
            draw(ctxL, 2.0, hTank, hInit, alpha, longMax);
            draw(ctxS, 0.6, hTank, hInit, alpha, shortMax);
        }

        function draw(ctx, L, hTank, hInit, alpha, hSafe) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 420, 220);
            const scale = 140;
            const ox = 210 - L * scale / 2;
            const oy = 185;
            const dh = (L / 2) * Math.tan(alpha);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#1f2937';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.strokeRect(ox, oy - hTank * scale, L * scale, hTank * scale);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59,130,246,0.45)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(ox, oy - (hInit + dh) * scale);
            ctx.lineTo(ox + L * scale, oy - (hInit - dh) * scale);
            ctx.lineTo(ox + L * scale, oy);
            ctx.lineTo(ox, oy);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(ox, oy - hSafe * scale);
            ctx.lineTo(ox + L * scale, oy - hSafe * scale);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 11px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`h_vmax = ${hSafe.toFixed(3)} m`, 18, 20);
            ctx.fillText(hInit > hSafe ? 'prelijevanje' : 'sigurno', 18, 38);
        }

        [slAx, slHi].forEach((slider) => slider.addEventListener('input', update));
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Nagib površine zavisi samo o ubrzanju, ali "podizanje" vode na rubovima direktno ovisi o duljini spremnika u smjeru kretanja. Okretanje spremnika kraćom stranom u smjeru vožnje dramatično smanjuje rizik od prelijevanja.
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

<hr class='zadatak-sep'>

### Zadatak Z32 — Otvoreni ubrzani spremnik: tlak na dnu {.unnumbered}

Otvoreni spremnik pravokutnog presjeka giba se pravocrtno u smjeru dulje baze jednolikim ubrzanjem iznosa 2,4 $\text{m/s}^2$. Duljina, širina i visina spremnika iznose 6 m, 2,5 m i 2 m. Ukoliko je spremnik ispunjen vodom do visine 1 m, potrebno je odrediti nagib slobodne površine uslijed pravocrtnog ubrzanja, kao i iznose maksimalnog i minimalnog tlaka na dnu spremnika.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$a_x$ = $2,4 \, \text{m/s}^2$, $L$ = $6 \, \text{m}$, $b$ = $2,5 \, \text{m}$, $h_s$ = $2,0 \, \text{m}$, $h_0$ = $1,0 \, \text{m}$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">nagib površine $\alpha = ?$; $p_{dmax} = ?$; $p_{dmin} = ?$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

Nagib slobodne površine:
$$\tan \alpha = \frac{a_x}{g} = \frac{2,4}{9,81} = 0,2446 \implies \alpha = \mathbf{13,75^\circ}$$

Maksimalna i minimalna visina stupca vode na dnu:
$$h_{max} = h_0 + \frac{L}{2} \tan \alpha = 1,0 + \frac{6,0}{2} \cdot 0,2446 = \mathbf{1,734 \, \text{m}}$$
$$h_{min} = h_0 - \frac{L}{2} \tan \alpha = 1,0 - \frac{6,0}{2} \cdot 0,2446 = \mathbf{0,266 \, \text{m}}$$

Tlakovi na dnu:
$$p_{dmax} = \rho \cdot g \cdot h_{max} = 1000 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 1,734 = \mathbf{17,0 \, \text{kPa}}$$
$$p_{dmin} = \rho \cdot g \cdot h_{min} = 1000 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,266 = \mathbf{2,6 \, \text{kPa}}$$

```{=html}
<div id="widget-z32-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <div class="z32-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z32-kicker">Z32 laboratorij tlaka na dnu</div>
            <h4 class="z32-title">U otvorenom ubrzanom spremniku tlak na dnu ovisi o lokalnoj visini stupca, ne o jednom globalnom nivou</h4>
            <p class="z32-sub">Najvažnije je vidjeti da je slobodna površina nagnuta, pa lijevi i desni kraj dna ne nose isti hidrostatski stupac. Zato se tlak na dnu ne računa jednom formulom za cijelo dno, nego preko lokalnih visina $h_{max}$ i $h_{min}$.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z32-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Lanac</div>
            <div><strong>tan α = a_x / g</strong></div>
            <div><strong>h_max/min = h₀ ± L tanα / 2</strong></div>
            <div><strong>p_d = ρgh</strong> lokalno na dnu</div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z32-controls">
        <div class="z32-control">
            <label>Horizontalno ubrzanje aₓ: <span id="z32-v-a" style="color:#2563eb;">2.4</span> m/s²</label>
            <input type="range" id="z32-a" min="0" max="8" step="0.1" value="2.4" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z32-metrics">
        <div class="z32-metric"><small>Kut α</small><strong style="color:#0f172a;"><span id="z32-res-alpha">13.8</span>°</strong></div>
        <div class="z32-metric"><small>h_max na dnu</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z32-res-hmax">1.734</span> m</strong></div>
        <div class="z32-metric"><small>h_min na dnu</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="z32-res-hmin">0.266</span> m</strong></div>
        <div class="z32-metric"><small>p_dmax / p_dmin</small><strong style="color:#b45309;"><span id="z32-res-pmax">17.0</span> / <span id="z32-res-pmin">2.6</span> kPa</strong></div>
    </div>
    <div class="z32-scene"><canvas id="z32-canvas" width="900" height="340"></canvas></div>
    <div class="z32-explainer" id="z32-explainer"></div>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('z32-canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const aS = document.getElementById('z32-a');

        function update() {
            const a = parseFloat(aS.value);
            const g = 9.81;
            const L = 6.0;
            const h0 = 1.0;
            const rho = 1000;
            const alpha = Math.atan(a / g);
            const hMax = h0 + (L / 2) * Math.tan(alpha);
            const hMin = Math.max(0, h0 - (L / 2) * Math.tan(alpha));
            const pMax = rho * g * hMax;
            const pMin = rho * g * hMin;

            document.getElementById('z32-v-a').textContent = a.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z32-res-alpha').textContent = (alpha * 180 / Math.PI).toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z32-res-hmax').textContent = hMax.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z32-res-hmin').textContent = hMin.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z32-res-pmax').textContent = (pMax / 1000).toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z32-res-pmin').textContent = (pMin / 1000).toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z32-explainer').textContent = `Pri ubrzanju ${a.toFixed(1)} m/s² površina se naginje za ${(alpha * 180 / Math.PI).toFixed(1)}°. Na stražnjem dnu ostaje stupac vode ${hMax.toFixed(3)} m i zato tlak raste na ${(pMax / 1000).toFixed(1)} kPa, dok je na prednjem dnu stupac samo ${hMin.toFixed(3)} m pa tlak pada na ${(pMin / 1000).toFixed(1)} kPa.`;
            draw(alpha, hMax, hMin, pMax, pMin);
        }

        function draw(alpha, hMax, hMin, pMax, pMin) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const ox = 110;
            const oy = 285;
            const w = 560;
            const scale = 120;
            const hTank = 2.0 * scale;
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#1f2937';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.strokeRect(ox, oy - hTank, w, hTank);

            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(37,99,235,0.42)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(ox, oy - hMax * scale);
            ctx.lineTo(ox + w, oy - hMin * scale);
            ctx.lineTo(ox + w, oy);
            ctx.lineTo(ox, oy);
            ctx.fill();

            const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(ox + w, oy - hMin * scale, ox, oy);
            grad.addColorStop(0, '#e0f2fe');
            grad.addColorStop(1, '#1d4ed8');
            ctx.fillStyle = grad;
            ctx.globalAlpha = 0.45;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(ox, oy - hMax * scale);
            ctx.lineTo(ox + w, oy - hMin * scale);
            ctx.lineTo(ox + w, oy);
            ctx.lineTo(ox, oy);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.globalAlpha = 1;

            ctx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#ef4444';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(ox - 20, oy - hMax * scale);
            ctx.lineTo(ox + 18, oy - hMax * scale);
            ctx.moveTo(ox + w - 18, oy - hMin * scale);
```
