            ctx.lineTo(ox + w + 20, oy - hMin * scale);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`h_max = ${hMax.toFixed(3)} m`, ox + 12, 24);
            ctx.fillText(`h_min = ${hMin.toFixed(3)} m`, ox + w - 120, 24);
            ctx.fillText(`p_dmax = ${(pMax / 1000).toFixed(1)} kPa`, ox - 8, oy + 24);
            ctx.fillText(`p_dmin = ${(pMin / 1000).toFixed(1)} kPa`, ox + w - 22, oy + 24);
            ctx.fillText(`α = ${(alpha * 180 / Math.PI).toFixed(1)}°`, 730, 48);
        }

        aS.addEventListener('input', update);
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

<hr class='zadatak-sep'>

### Zadatak Z33 — Cisterna mlijeka: tlak u zatvorenom spremniku {.unnumbered}

Mlijeko gustoće $1020 \, \text{kg/m}^3$ transportira se pravocrtno cestom konstantnog nagiba unutar spremnika cisterne promjera 3 m, duljine 7 m. Spremnik je potpuno ispunjen mlijekom, pri čemu cisterna konstantno ubrzava intenzitetom $2,5 \, \text{m/s}^2$. Ukoliko minimalan tlak u spremniku iznosi 100 kPa, odredite maksimalan pretlak u spremniku te mjesto na kojemu se pojavljuje.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$\rho_m$ = $1020 \, \text{kg/m}^3$, $d$ = $3 \, \text{m}$, $l$ = $7 \, \text{m}$, $a_x$ = $2,5 \, \text{m/s}^2$, $p_{min}$ = $100 \, \text{kPa}$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$p_{pmax} = ?$; mjesto maksimalnog tlaka</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

U zatvorenom spremniku bez slobodne površine, maksimalni tlak se pojavljuje u točki najudaljenijoj u smjeru rezultantne masene sile (donji stražnji rub ako se ubrzava naprijed).

Maksimalan apsolutni tlak:
$$p_{max} = p_{min} + \rho \cdot a_x \cdot l + \rho \cdot g \cdot d$$
$$p_{max} = 100000 + 1020 \cdot 2,5 \cdot 7,0 + 1020 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 3,0 = \mathbf{147,7 \, \text{kPa}}$$

Maksimalan pretlak (uz atmosferski tlak 101,3 kPa):
$$p_{pmax} = p_{max} - p_{atm} = 147,7 - 101,3 = \mathbf{46,4 \, \text{kPa}}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<div id="widget-z33-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <div class="z33-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z33-kicker">Z33 laboratorij zatvorene cisterne</div>
            <h4 class="z33-title">Bez slobodne površine tlak se širi kroz cijeli volumen, a minimum od 100 kPa je referentna točka</h4>
            <p class="z33-sub">Ovaj zadatak treba čitati obrnuto od otvorenog spremnika: ne polaziš od slobodne površine, nego od zadane minimalne točke u volumenu. Odatle se tlak linearno povećava prema dnu i prema stražnjem dijelu cisterne u smjeru rezultantne masene sile.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z33-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Referenca</div>
            <div><strong>p_max = p_min + ρa_x l + ρgd</strong></div>
            <div>za a&gt;0 minimum je gore sprijeda</div>
            <div>maksimum je dolje straga</div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z33-controls">
        <div class="z33-control">
            <label>Ubrzanje aₓ: <span id="z33-v-a" style="color:#2563eb;">2.5</span> m/s²</label>
            <input type="range" id="z33-a" min="-8" max="8" step="0.1" value="2.5" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div class="z33-control">
            <label>Interaktivna sonda</label>
            <div style="font-size:0.82rem; color:#475569; line-height:1.55;">Pomakni miš preko cisterne. Widget računa lokalni tlak iz zadane minimalne točke od 100 kPa i lokalne udaljenosti kroz polje ubrzanja i gravitacije.</div>
            <button id="z33-brake" class="z33-action" style="margin-top:10px;">Prebaci na naglo kočenje</button>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z33-metrics">
        <div class="z33-metric"><small>Maksimalan apsolutni tlak</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z33-res-pabs">147.7</span> kPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z33-metric"><small>Maksimalan pretlak</small><strong style="color:#be123c;"><span id="z33-res-pmax">46.4</span> kPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z33-metric"><small>Mjesto maksimuma</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;" id="z33-res-place">donji stražnji rub</strong></div>
        <div class="z33-metric"><small>Sonda</small><strong style="color:#b45309;"><span id="z33-probe-p">--</span> kPa</strong></div>
    </div>
    <div class="z33-scene"><canvas id="z33-canvas" width="900" height="320"></canvas></div>
    <div class="z33-explainer" id="z33-explainer"></div>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('z33-canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const aS = document.getElementById('z33-a');
        const brakeBtn = document.getElementById('z33-brake');
        const rho = 1020;
        const pMinAbs = 100000;
        const pAtm = 101300;
        const pVapor = 2330;
        const L = 7.0;
        const D = 3.0;
        const ox = 140;
        const oy = 60;
        const w = 560;
        const h = 180;
        let mouseX = -1;
        let mouseY = -1;

        function update() {
            const a = parseFloat(aS.value);
            const pMax = pMinAbs + rho * Math.abs(a) * L + rho * 9.81 * D;
            const pGauge = pMax - pAtm;
            document.getElementById('z33-v-a').textContent = a.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z33-res-pabs').textContent = (pMax / 1000).toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z33-res-pmax').textContent = (pGauge / 1000).toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z33-res-place').textContent = a >= 0 ? 'donji stražnji rub' : 'donji prednji rub';
            document.getElementById('z33-explainer').textContent = `Za ubrzanje ${a.toFixed(1)} m/s² tlak raste od zadane minimalne točke 100 kPa kroz uzdužni doprinos ρa_xl i vertikalni doprinos ρgd. Zato najveći apsolutni tlak iznosi ${(pMax / 1000).toFixed(1)} kPa, odnosno najveći pretlak ${(pGauge / 1000).toFixed(1)} kPa.`;
            draw(a, pMax);
            updateProbe(a);
        }

        function draw(a, pMax) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(a >= 0 ? ox + w : ox, oy, a >= 0 ? ox : ox + w, oy + h);
            grad.addColorStop(0, '#dbeafe');
            grad.addColorStop(1, '#1d4ed8');
            ctx.fillStyle = grad;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.roundRect(ox, oy, w, h, 36);
            ctx.fill();

            ctx.save();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.roundRect(ox, oy, w, h, 36);
            ctx.clip();
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
            const slope = (a / 9.81) * 16;
            for (let i = -w; i < w * 2; i += 36) {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(ox, oy + i);
                ctx.lineTo(ox + w, oy + i - slope);
                ctx.stroke();
            }
            ctx.restore();

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#1f2937';
            ctx.lineWidth = 4;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.roundRect(ox, oy, w, h, 36);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(a >= 0 ? 'p_min = 100 kPa' : 'p_max zona', ox + w - 120, oy - 12);
            ctx.fillText(a >= 0 ? 'p_max zona' : 'p_min = 100 kPa', ox + 12, oy + h + 26);
            ctx.fillText(`p_max = ${(pMax / 1000).toFixed(1)} kPa`, ox + 210, 34);
        }

        function updateProbe(a) {
            if (mouseX < ox || mouseX > ox + w || mouseY < oy || mouseY > oy + h) {
                document.getElementById('z33-probe-p').textContent = '--';
                return;
            }
            const xDist = a >= 0 ? ((ox + w - mouseX) / w) * L : ((mouseX - ox) / w) * L;
            const zDist = ((mouseY - oy) / h) * D;
            const p = pMinAbs + rho * Math.abs(a) * xDist + rho * 9.81 * zDist;
            const pGauge = (p - pAtm) / 1000;
            document.getElementById('z33-probe-p').textContent = pGauge.toFixed(1);
            ctx.strokeStyle = p < pVapor ? '#dc2626' : '#0f766e';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(mouseX, mouseY, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.stroke();
        }

        canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (event) => {
            const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
            mouseX = event.clientX - rect.left;
            mouseY = event.clientY - rect.top;
            update();
        });
        brakeBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            aS.value = '-2.5';
            update();
        });
        aS.addEventListener('input', update);
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

## Napredni interaktivni koncepti statike fluida

### N1: Stabilnost plovnih tijela (Metacentar)

Kada se plovno tijelo nagne, centar uzgona ($B$) pomiče se u smjeru nagiba. Sjecište okomice kroz novi centar uzgona i osi simetrije naziva se **metacentar ($M$)**. Ako je $M$ iznad težišta ($G$), tijelo je stabilno i stvara se moment ispravljanja. U protivnom, tijelo se prevrće.

```{=html}
<div id="z-n1-widget" style="max-width: 850px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 35px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 700;">N1: Metacentarska visina i stabilnost broda</h4>
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 25px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <div style="flex: 1.5; min-width: 350px;">
            <canvas id="n1-canvas" width="450" height="300" style="width: 100%; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7;"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 260px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px;">
            <div style="padding: 15px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 10px;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 8px;">Kut nagiba α: <span id="n1-v-alpha">15</span>°</label>
                <input type="range" id="n1-alpha" min="-45" max="45" value="15" style="width: 100%; cursor: pointer;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 15px; margin-bottom: 8px;">Visina težišta (G):</label>
                <input type="range" id="n1-g" min="30" max="120" value="60" style="width: 100%; cursor: pointer;">
            </div>
            <div id="n1-status-box" style="padding: 15px; border-radius: 10px; border-left: 5px solid #48bb78; background: #f0fff4;">
                <div id="n1-status" style="font-weight: 800; color: #2f855a; font-size: 1.2rem;">STABILNO</div>
                <div style="font-size: 0.8rem; margin-top: 5px; color: #2f855a;" id="n1-desc">Moment vraća brod u ravnotežu.</div>
                <div style="font-size: 0.8rem; margin-top: 8px; color: #334155;">GM = <strong id="n1-gm">0.00</strong> mm</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function(){
    const canvas = document.getElementById('n1-canvas'); const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const alphaS = document.getElementById('n1-alpha'); const gS = document.getElementById('n1-g');
    function update(){
        const alpha = parseFloat(alphaS.value) * Math.PI / 180;
        const gH = parseFloat(gS.value);
        document.getElementById('n1-v-alpha').innerText = parseFloat(alphaS.value).toFixed(0);

        const B = 140; const T = 80; const D = 120;
        const BM = (B*B) / (12*T);
        const KB = T/2;
        const KM = KB + BM;
        const KG = gH;
        const GM = KM - KG;

        const statusBox = document.getElementById('n1-status-box');
        const statusTxt = document.getElementById('n1-status');
        const descTxt = document.getElementById('n1-desc');
        document.getElementById('n1-gm').innerText = GM.toFixed(1);

        if (GM > 0) {
            statusBox.style.background = "#f0fff4"; statusBox.style.borderLeftColor = "#48bb78";
            statusTxt.style.color = "#2f855a"; statusTxt.innerText = "STABILNO (M iznad G)";
            descTxt.style.color = "#2f855a"; descTxt.innerText = "Moment ispravljanja vraća brod u vertikalu.";
        } else {
            statusBox.style.background = "#fff5f5"; statusBox.style.borderLeftColor = "#e53e3e";
            statusTxt.style.color = "#c53030"; statusTxt.innerText = "NESTABILNO (G iznad M)";
            descTxt.style.color = "#c53030"; descTxt.innerText = "Moment prevrtanja rotira brod dalje.";
        }
        draw(alpha, gH, B, T, D, BM, KB, KM, GM);
    }
    function draw(alpha, KG, B, T, D, BM, KB, KM, GM){
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,450,300);
        const ox = 225, oy = 200;

        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(66,153,225,0.3)";
        ctx.fillRect(0, oy, 450, 100);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#3182ce"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0,oy); ctx.lineTo(450,oy); ctx.stroke();

        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(ox, oy);
        ctx.rotate(alpha);

        ctx.fillStyle = "#e2e8f0"; ctx.strokeStyle = "#4a5568"; ctx.lineWidth=3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.rect(-B/2, -D+T, B, D);
        ctx.fill(); ctx.stroke();

        ctx.setLineDash([5,5]); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, -D+T-20); ctx.lineTo(0, T+20); ctx.stroke(); ctx.setLineDash([]);

        const gY = T - KG;
        const bY = T - KB;
        const mY = T - KM;

        ctx.restore();

        const globalG = {x: ox + (T-KG)*Math.sin(alpha), y: oy + (T-KG)*Math.cos(alpha)};
        const globalM = {x: ox + (T-KM)*Math.sin(alpha), y: oy + (T-KM)*Math.cos(alpha)};

        ctx.fillStyle = "#e53e3e"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(globalG.x, globalG.y, 5, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        ctx.fillText("G", globalG.x+8, globalG.y+5);

        ctx.fillStyle = "#38a169"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(globalM.x, globalM.y, 5, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        ctx.fillText("M", globalM.x+8, globalM.y-5);

        drawArrow(globalG.x, globalG.y, globalG.x, globalG.y+50, "#e53e3e", "G");
        drawArrow(globalM.x, globalG.y+40, globalM.x, globalG.y-30, "#3182ce", "Uzgon");
    }
    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 8; const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
        ctx.fillText(label, x1-15, y2+(y2>y1?15:-5));
    }
    [alphaS, gS].forEach(s => s.oninput = update); update();
})();
</script>

```

### N2: Pascalov princip i hidrostatski paradoks

Pritisak na tekućinu u zatvorenoj posudi prenosi se nesmanjen u sve dijelove tekućine. Ovaj widget pokazuje kako pritisak na jedan klip ravnomjerno podiže razinu u spojenim posudama različitih oblika.

```{=html}
<div id="z-n2-widget" style="max-width: 850px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 35px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 700;">N2: Hidrostatski paradoks i prijenos tlaka</h4>
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 25px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <div style="flex: 1.5; min-width: 350px;">
            <canvas id="n2-canvas" width="450" height="250" style="width: 100%; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7;"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 260px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: 15px;">
            <div style="padding: 15px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 10px; text-align: center;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 15px; color: #475569;">Pritisni klip (Sila F): <span id="n2-force-val">0</span> N</label>
                <input type="range" id="n2-force" min="0" max="100" value="0" style="width: 100%; cursor: pointer;">
            </div>
            <div style="background: #ebf8ff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 10px; border-left: 5px solid #3182ce; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #2c5282; font-weight: 600;">Dodatni tlak u cijeloj tekućini (Δp):</div>
                <div style="font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 800; color: #2b6cb0; margin-top: 5px;" id="n2-dp">0 Pa</div>
                <div style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #475569; margin-top: 8px;">Sve spojene posude odgovaraju istim porastom razine: <strong id="n2-rise">0.0</strong> cm</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function(){
    const canvas = document.getElementById('n2-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const fS = document.getElementById('n2-force');
    const pistonArea = 0.002;
    function update(){
        const F = parseFloat(fS.value);
        const dp = F / pistonArea;
        const rise = dp / (1000 * 9.81);
        document.getElementById('n2-force-val').innerText = F.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('n2-dp').innerText = dp.toFixed(0) + ' Pa';
        document.getElementById('n2-rise').innerText = (rise * 100).toFixed(1);
        draw(rise, F);
    }
    function draw(rise, force){
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,450,250);
        const baseY = 210;
        const fluidY = baseY - 70 - rise * 55;
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(66,153,225,0.38)';
        ctx.fillRect(50, baseY, 350, 18);
        ctx.fillRect(50, fluidY, 40, baseY - fluidY + 18);
        ctx.fillRect(150, fluidY, 30, baseY - fluidY + 18);
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(250, baseY + 18); ctx.lineTo(280, baseY + 18); ctx.lineTo(305, fluidY); ctx.lineTo(280, fluidY); ctx.fill();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(350, baseY + 18); ctx.lineTo(400, baseY + 18); ctx.lineTo(420, fluidY); ctx.lineTo(330, fluidY); ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#4a5568'; ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(50, 45); ctx.lineTo(50, baseY + 18); ctx.lineTo(400, baseY + 18); ctx.lineTo(420, 45);
        ctx.moveTo(90, 45); ctx.lineTo(90, baseY); ctx.lineTo(150, baseY); ctx.lineTo(150, 45);
        ctx.moveTo(180, 45); ctx.lineTo(180, baseY); ctx.lineTo(250, baseY); ctx.lineTo(280, 45);
        ctx.moveTo(310, 45); ctx.lineTo(280, baseY); ctx.lineTo(350, baseY); ctx.lineTo(330, 45);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
        ctx.fillRect(52, fluidY - 14, 36, 14);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#dc2626';
        ctx.fillRect(68, fluidY - 44, 4, 30);
        if (force > 0) {
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(65, fluidY - 14); ctx.lineTo(75, fluidY - 14); ctx.lineTo(70, fluidY - 4); ctx.fill();
        }

        ctx.setLineDash([5,5]);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#3182ce';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(100, fluidY); ctx.lineTo(430, fluidY);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.font = 'bold 11px Arial';
        ctx.fillText('ista razina u svim krakovima', 208, fluidY - 10);
    }
    fS.oninput = update;
    update();
})();
</script>

```

### N3: Sila hidrostatskog tlaka na ravnu stijenu (Branu)

Hidrostatski tlak raste linearno s dubinom, što rezultira trokutastom raspodjelom tlaka. Ukupna sila djeluje u točki koja se naziva **centar tlaka**, a nalazi se na $2/3$ dubine od površine (odnosno $h/3$ od dna).

```{=html}
<div id="z-n3-widget" style="max-width: 850px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 35px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 700;">N3: Raspodjela tlaka na vertikalnu branu</h4>
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 25px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <div style="flex: 1.5; min-width: 350px;">
            <canvas id="n3-canvas" width="450" height="300" style="width: 100%; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7;"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 260px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px;">
            <div style="padding: 15px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 10px;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Razina vode h: <span id="n3-v-h" style="color: #3182ce;">5.0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="n3-h" min="1" max="10" step="0.1" value="5.0" style="width: 100%; cursor: pointer;">
            </div>
            <div style="background: #fffaf0; padding: 18px; border-radius: 10px; border-left: 5px solid #ed8936;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #c05621; font-weight: 600;">Ukupna sila (po metru širine):</div>
                <div style="font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #c05621;" id="n3-res-f">122.6 kN</div>
                <hr style="border:0; border-top:1px solid #feebc8; margin:12px 0;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #c05621; font-weight: 600;">Pozicija hvata sile (od dna):</div>
                <div style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #c05621;" id="n3-res-y">1.67 m</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function(){
    const canvas = document.getElementById('n3-canvas'); const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const hS = document.getElementById('n3-h');
    function update(){
        const h = parseFloat(hS.value);
        const rho = 1000; const g = 9.81;
        const F = 0.5 * rho * g * h * h;
        const y_cp = h / 3;

        document.getElementById('n3-v-h').innerText = h.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('n3-res-f').innerText = (F/1000).toFixed(1) + " kN";
        document.getElementById('n3-res-y').innerText = y_cp.toFixed(2) + " m";
        draw(h, y_cp, F);
    }
    function draw(h, y_cp, F){
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,450,300);
        const scale = 20; const oy = 250; const wallX = 250;

        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(66,153,225,0.2)";
        ctx.fillRect(50, oy - h*scale, wallX-50, h*scale);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#3182ce"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(50, oy-h*scale); ctx.lineTo(wallX, oy-h*scale); ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = "#718096"; ctx.fillRect(wallX, oy - 220, 20, 220);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#a0aec0"; ctx.fillRect(0, oy, 450, 50);

        const pMax = h * 6;
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(237, 137, 54, 0.3)";
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(wallX, oy - h*scale); ctx.lineTo(wallX - pMax, oy); ctx.lineTo(wallX, oy); ctx.fill();
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#ed8936"; ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(237, 137, 54, 0.6)"; ctx.lineWidth=1;
        for(let i=1; i<=7; i++){
            let yi = oy - h*scale + (h*scale/8)*i;
            let xi = wallX - pMax*(i/8);
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(xi, yi); ctx.lineTo(wallX, yi); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(wallX-5, yi-3); ctx.lineTo(wallX, yi); ctx.lineTo(wallX-5, yi+3); ctx.stroke();
        }

        const fy = oy - y_cp*scale;
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#e53e3e"; ctx.lineWidth = 3; ctx.fillStyle = "#e53e3e";
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(wallX - pMax - 40, fy); ctx.lineTo(wallX, fy); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(wallX-10, fy-5); ctx.lineTo(wallX, fy); ctx.lineTo(wallX-10, fy+5); ctx.fill();
        ctx.font="bold 14px sans-serif"; ctx.fillText("F", wallX - pMax - 55, fy + 5);

        ctx.setLineDash([2,2]); ctx.strokeStyle="#4a5568"; ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(wallX+30, oy); ctx.lineTo(wallX+30, fy); ctx.stroke(); ctx.setLineDash([]);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#4a5568"; ctx.fillText("h/3", wallX+35, oy - y_cp*scale/2 + 5);
    }
    hS.oninput = update; update();
})();
</script>

```

### N4: Dinamičko ljuljanje tekućine (Sloshing)

Ubrzani spremnici iz prethodnih zadataka prikazuju **stacionarno** stanje. Međutim, kada se kamion naglo zaustavi ili krene, tekućina oscilira prije nego se smiri.

```{=html}
<div id="z-n4-widget" style="max-width: 850px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 35px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 700;">N4: Osciliranje tekućine pri nagloj promjeni ubrzanja</h4>
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 25px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <div style="flex: 1.5; min-width: 350px;">
            <canvas id="n4-canvas" width="450" height="200" style="width: 100%; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7;"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 260px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: 15px;">
            <button id="n4-start" style="padding: 15px; background: #ebf8ff; border: 2px solid #3182ce; color: #2b6cb0; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 700; transition: 0.2s;">▶️ Gurni spremnik (Ubrzaj)</button>
            <button id="n4-stop" style="padding: 15px; background: #fff5f5; border: 2px solid #e53e3e; color: #c53030; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 700; transition: 0.2s;">🛑 Naglo kočenje!</button>
            <div style="padding: 14px; background:#f8fafc; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:10px; font-size:0.82rem; color:#334155;">
                Trenutni nagib: <strong id="n4-angle">0.0</strong>°<br>
                Režim: <strong id="n4-mode">miruje</strong>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function(){
    const canvas = document.getElementById('n4-canvas'); const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const startBtn = document.getElementById('n4-start'); const stopBtn = document.getElementById('n4-stop');

    let targetAngle = 0;
    let currentAngle = 0;
    let velocity = 0;

    function loop() {
        const spring = 0.04;
        const damping = 0.94;

        const force = (targetAngle - currentAngle) * spring;
        velocity += force;
        velocity *= damping;
        currentAngle += velocity;
        document.getElementById('n4-angle').innerText = (currentAngle * 180 / Math.PI).toFixed(1);

        draw(currentAngle);
        requestAnimationFrame(loop);
    }

    function draw(angle) {
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,450,200);
        const w = 250, h = 140, ox = 100, oy = 180;

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#2d3748"; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.strokeRect(ox, oy-h, w, h);

        const dh = Math.tan(angle) * (w/2);
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(66, 153, 225, 0.5)";
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox, oy);
        ctx.lineTo(ox+w, oy);
        ctx.lineTo(ox+w, oy-70+dh);
        ctx.lineTo(ox, oy-70-dh);
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#2b6cb0"; ctx.lineWidth=3;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ox, oy-70-dh); ctx.lineTo(ox+w, oy-70+dh); ctx.stroke();
    }

    startBtn.onclick = () => { targetAngle = Math.atan(4/9.81); velocity += 0.05; document.getElementById('n4-mode').innerText = 'ubrzavanje'; };
    stopBtn.onclick = () => { targetAngle = 0; velocity = -0.2; document.getElementById('n4-mode').innerText = 'kočenje'; };

    loop();
})();
</script>

```

### N5: Barometarska formula (Tlak u atmosferi)

Atmosferski zrak je stlačiv plin. Za razliku od nestlačivih kapljevina kod kojih tlak raste linearno, kod plinova u izotermnim uvjetima gustoća raste proporcionalno tlaku, što rezultira **eksponencijalnim** padom tlaka s visinom.

```{=html}
<div id="z-n5-widget" style="max-width: 850px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 35px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 700;">N5: Tlak zraka s visinom (Altimetar)</h4>
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 25px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <div style="flex: 1.5; min-width: 350px; position: relative;">
            <canvas id="n5-canvas" width="450" height="250" style="width: 100%; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7;"></canvas>
            <div style="position: absolute; right:15px; top: 15px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); padding: 8px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #4a5568;">
                p = p₀ · e<sup>-(Mg/RT)z</sup>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 260px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px;">
            <div style="padding: 15px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 10px;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Nadmorska visina z: <span id="n5-v-z" style="color: #3182ce;">0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="n5-z" min="0" max="10000" step="100" value="0" style="width: 100%; cursor: pointer;">
            </div>
            <div style="background: #ebf8ff; padding: 18px; border-radius: 10px; border-left: 5px solid #3182ce;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #2c5282; font-weight: 600;">Atmosferski tlak:</div>
                <div style="font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 800; color: #2b6cb0;" id="n5-res-p">101.3 kPa</div>
                <hr style="border:0; border-top:1px solid #bee3f8; margin:10px 0;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #4a5568;">Gustoća zraka: <span id="n5-res-rho" style="font-weight:bold; color: #2d3748;">1.22</span> kg/m³</div>
                <div style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #4a5568; margin-top:6px;">Pad tlaka u odnosu na more: <span id="n5-res-loss" style="font-weight:bold; color: #2d3748;">0.0</span>%</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function(){
    const canvas = document.getElementById('n5-canvas'); const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const zS = document.getElementById('n5-z');
    function update(){
        const z = parseFloat(zS.value);
        const p0 = 101325;
        const rho0 = 1.225;
        const p = p0 * Math.exp(-0.00012 * z);
        const rho = rho0 * Math.exp(-0.00012 * z);

        document.getElementById('n5-v-z').innerText = z;
        document.getElementById('n5-res-p').innerText = (p/1000).toFixed(1) + " kPa";
        document.getElementById('n5-res-rho').innerText = rho.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('n5-res-loss').innerText = ((1 - p / p0) * 100).toFixed(1);

        draw(z, p);
    }
    function draw(z, p){
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,450,250);

        const relZ = z / 10000;
        const r = Math.round(135 - relZ*100);
        const g = Math.round(206 - relZ*150);
        const b = Math.round(250 - relZ*100);
        ctx.fillStyle = `rgb(${r},${g},${b})`;
        ctx.fillRect(0,0,450,250);

        ctx.fillStyle = "#cbd5e0";
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0,250); ctx.lineTo(150, 50); ctx.lineTo(350, 250); ctx.fill();
        ctx.fillStyle = "#e2e8f0";
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(150,50); ctx.lineTo(200, 150); ctx.lineTo(350, 250); ctx.lineTo(0, 250); ctx.fill();

        const hPx = 220 - (z/10000)*180;
        ctx.fillStyle = "#e53e3e";
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(225, hPx, 15, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        ctx.fillStyle = "#2d3748"; ctx.fillRect(220, hPx+15, 10, 10);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#4a5568"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(220, hPx+5); ctx.lineTo(220, hPx+15); ctx.moveTo(230, hPx+5); ctx.lineTo(230, hPx+15); ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)";
        const numParticles = Math.round(150 * (p/101325));
        for(let i=0; i<numParticles; i++){
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(270 + Math.random()*160, 20 + Math.random()*210, 1.5, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        }
    }
    zS.oninput = update; update();
})();
</script>

```

### N6: Rezultantna sila na kružni segment i ekscentricitet

Kod proračuna sila na zakrivljene plohe, važno je uočiti razliku između dvije ključne točke:
1.  **Težište plohe ($G$):** Točka koja predstavlja geometrijsko središte zakrivljene plohe.
2.  **Hvatište sile ($CP$ - Centar tlaka):** Točka u kojoj rezultantna sila zapravo djeluje na plohu.

**Zašto se one ne podudaraju?** 
Hidrostatski tlak raste s dubinom ($p = \rho g h$). To znači da donja polovica zakrivljenog segmenta "osjeća" znatno veću silu nego gornja polovica. Zbog te neravnomjerne raspodjele, rezultantna sila se uvijek pomiče **prema dolje** (prema zoni većeg tlaka) u odnosu na geometrijsko težište. Taj pomak nazivamo ekscentricitet.

*Napomena: Iako hvatište na plohi nije u težištu, kod kružnog segmenta rezultanta $F_R$ i dalje mora prolaziti kroz centar zakrivljenosti ($O$) jer su sve lokalne sile radijalne.*

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET N6: G vs CP na kružnom segmentu -->
<div id="z-n6-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">📐 Analiza hvatišta: Težište (G) vs. Centar tlaka (CP)</h4>

    <div style="display: flex; gap: 30px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <!-- Vizualizacija -->
        <div style="flex: 1.8; min-width: 400px; position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 400px;">
            <canvas id="n6-canvas" width="500" height="400" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>

            <div style="position: absolute; top: 15px; right: 15px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95); padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.7rem; border: 1px solid #cbd5e0;">
                <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; margin-bottom:5px;">
                    <div style="width:10px; height:10px; background:#ed8936; border-radius:50%;"></div> Težište segmenta (G)
                </div>
                <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; margin-bottom:5px;">
                    <div style="width:10px; height:10px; background:#e53e3e; border-radius:50%;"></div> Centar tlaka (CP)
                </div>
                <div style="border-top:1px solid #eee; margin-top:5px; padding-top:5px; color:#718096;">
                    *CP je niže od G zbog rasta tlaka
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Kontrole -->
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 280px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 12px;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px;">Dubina do centra h_c: <span id="n6-v-hc" style="color: #2563eb;">2.0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="n6-hc" min="0.5" max="5.0" step="0.1" value="2.0" style="width: 100%;">

                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px;">Radijus luka R: <span id="n6-v-r" style="color: #2563eb;">1.5</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="n6-r" min="0.5" max="3.0" step="0.1" value="1.5" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="background: #fff5f5; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 5px solid #e53e3e;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9b2c2c; text-transform: uppercase;">Ekscentricitet (pomak):</div>
                <div id="n6-res-ecc" style="font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 900; color: #c53030;">--- mm</div>
                <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #c53030; margin-top: 5px;">Razmak G-CP na vertikali.</div>
            </div>

            <div style="background: #ebf8ff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 5px solid #3182ce;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #2c5282;">REZULTANTA FR:</div>
                <div id="n6-res-fr" style="font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 900; color: #2b6cb0;">--- kN</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById("n6-canvas"); const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
    const hcS = document.getElementById("n6-hc"); const rS = document.getElementById("n6-r");

    function update() {
        const hc = parseFloat(hcS.value);
        const R = parseFloat(rS.value);
        const rho = 1000; const g = 9.81;

        // Proračun sila (po metru širine)
        const Fx = rho * g * hc * R; // Sila na četvrtinu kruga
        const Fy = rho * g * (hc * R + (Math.PI * R * R / 4));
        const FR = Math.sqrt(Fx*Fx + Fy*Fy);
        const angle = Math.atan2(Fy, Fx);

        // Ekscentricitet CP u odnosu na G
        // Pojednostavljeno za vizualizaciju: CP je nagnut prema dnu za dodatni kut
        const ecc_angle = (R / (hc * 4));

        document.getElementById("n6-v-hc").innerText = hc.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById("n6-v-r").innerText = R.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById("n6-res-fr").innerText = (FR/1000).toFixed(1) + " kN";
        document.getElementById("n6-res-ecc").innerText = (ecc_angle * R * 1000).toFixed(0) + " mm";

        draw(hc, R, angle, ecc_angle);
    }

    function draw(hc, R, res_angle, ecc_angle) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 500, 400);
        const scale = 65;
        const ox = 180, oy = 160; // Centriranije ishodište
        const R_px = R * scale;
        const hc_px = hc * scale;

        // 1. Fluid (Voda) - Prošireno na cijelu širinu
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(66, 153, 225, 0.15)";
        ctx.fillRect(0, oy - hc_px, 500, 400);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#3182ce"; ctx.setLineDash([10, 5]);
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, oy - hc_px); ctx.lineTo(500, oy - hc_px); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        // 2. Kružni segment (Četvrtina)
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(ox, oy, R_px, 0, Math.PI/2);
        ctx.lineWidth = 7; ctx.strokeStyle = "#4a5568"; ctx.stroke();

        // Središte zakrivljenosti O
        ctx.fillStyle = "#2d3748"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ox, oy, 4, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        ctx.font = "bold 13px Arial"; ctx.fillText("O (Centar)", ox - 25, oy - 15);

        // 3. Raspodjela tlaka (Vektori okomiti na tangentu)
        for(let a = 0; a <= Math.PI/2; a += Math.PI/12) {
            const depth = hc + Math.sin(a) * R;
            const p_len = depth * 15;
            const x1 = ox + Math.cos(a) * R_px;
            const y1 = oy + Math.sin(a) * R_px;
            const x2 = x1 - Math.cos(a) * p_len;
            const y2 = y1 - Math.sin(a) * p_len;
            drawArrowHead(x2, y2, x1, y1, "rgba(237, 137, 54, 0.5)", 1.5);
        }

        // 4. TOČKE G i CP
        const gx = ox + Math.cos(Math.PI/4) * R_px;
        const gy = oy + Math.sin(Math.PI/4) * R_px;
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ed8936"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(gx, gy, 5, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        ctx.font = "bold 11px Arial"; ctx.fillText("G", gx + 10, gy - 5);

        const cp_angle = Math.PI/4 + ecc_angle;
        const cpx = ox + Math.cos(cp_angle) * R_px;
        const cpy = oy + Math.sin(cp_angle) * R_px;
        ctx.fillStyle = "#e53e3e"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cpx, cpy, 5, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        ctx.fillText("CP", cpx + 10, cpy + 15);

        // 5. REZULTANTNA SILA
        const fLen = 100;
        ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]); ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(229, 62, 62, 0.3)";
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ox, oy); ctx.lineTo(cpx + Math.cos(cp_angle)*40, cpy + Math.sin(cp_angle)*40); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        drawArrowHead(ox, oy, ox + Math.cos(cp_angle)*(R_px + fLen), oy + Math.sin(cp_angle)*(R_px + fLen), "#e53e3e", 4, "FR");
    }

    function drawArrowHead(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, width, label) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI/6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI/6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI/6));
        ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
        if(label) ctx.fillText(label, x2 + 5, y2 + 5);
    }

    hcS.oninput = rS.oninput = update;
    update();
})();
</script>

```

### N7: Kompozitna stijenka (Ravna + Zakrivljena)

Inženjerske konstrukcije često se sastoje od više segmenata. Kod proračuna takve stijenke, ukupna sila je vektorski zbroj sila na pojedinim dijelovima:
1.  **Ravni dio:** Tlak raste linearno (trokut). Težište $G_1$ je na polovici visine, dok je hvatište $CP_1$ na $2/3$ dubine.
2.  **Zakrivljeni dio:** Tlak nastavlja rasti radijalno. Ima svoje geometrijsko težište $G_2$ i svoje hvatište $CP_2$ pomaknuto prema dolje.

Ukupna rezultantna sila sustava djeluje u točki koja se određuje pomoću **Varignonovog poučka** (momentni balans svih parcijalnih sila).

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET N7: Kompozitna brana G vs CP -->
<div id="z-n7-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">📐 Analiza dionica: Sile na kompozitnoj brani</h4>

    <div style="display: flex; gap: 30px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <!-- Vizualizacija -->
        <div style="flex: 1.8; min-width: 400px; position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 450px;">
            <canvas id="n7-canvas" width="500" height="450" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>

            <div style="position: absolute; top: 15px; right: 15px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95); padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.7rem; border: 1px solid #cbd5e0; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);">
                <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; margin-bottom:5px;">
                    <div style="width:10px; height:10px; background:#ed8936; border-radius:2px;"></div> Težišta (G₁, G₂)
                </div>
                <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; margin-bottom:5px;">
                    <div style="width:10px; height:10px; background:#e53e3e; border-radius:2px;"></div> Hvatišta (CP₁, CP₂)
                </div>
                <div style="border-top:1px solid #eee; margin-top:5px; padding-top:5px; color:#718096; line-height:1.3;">
                    * CP₁ je na 2/3 visine H<br>
                    * CP₂ je nagnut prema dnu
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Kontrole -->
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 280px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 12px;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px;">Visina ravnog dijela H: <span id="n7-v-h" style="color: #2563eb;">3.0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="n7-h" min="1" max="4" step="0.1" value="3.0" style="width: 100%;">

                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px;">Radijus segmenta R: <span id="n7-v-r" style="color: #2563eb;">1.5</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="n7-r" min="0.5" max="2.0" step="0.1" value="1.5" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="background: #fffaf0; padding: 18px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 5px solid #ed8936;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #c05621; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;">Sila na ravni dio (F₁):</div>
                <div id="n7-res-f1" style="font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 900; color: #c05621;">--- kN</div>
            </div>

            <div style="background: #ebf8ff; padding: 18px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 5px solid #3182ce;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #2c5282; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;">Sila na zakrivljeni dio (F₂):</div>
                <div id="n7-res-f2" style="font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 900; color: #2b6cb0;">--- kN</div>
            </div>

            <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 16px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 5px solid #64748b;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #475569; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;">Približna ukupna sila:</div>
                <div id="n7-res-ft" style="font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 900; color: #334155;">--- kN</div>
            </div>

            <p style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #718096; line-height: 1.5; font-style: italic;">
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 <b>Inženjerski uvid:</b> Ukupno hvatište cijele brane nalazi se između CP₁ i CP₂, bliže onom dijelu koji trpi veću silu (obično donji dio zbog većeg tlaka). </p> </div> </div> </div> </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById("n7-canvas"); const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
    const hS = document.getElementById("n7-h"); const rS = document.getElementById("n7-r");

    function update() {
        const H = parseFloat(hS.value);
        const R = parseFloat(rS.value);
        const rho = 1000; const g = 9.81;

        // F1 (Ravni dio) = rho * g * (H/2) * H
        const F1 = 0.5 * rho * g * H * H;
        // F2 (Zakrivljeni dio) - cca Fx
        const F2 = rho * g * (H + R/2) * R;

        document.getElementById("n7-v-h").innerText = H.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById("n7-v-r").innerText = R.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById("n7-res-f1").innerText = (F1/1000).toFixed(1) + " kN";
        document.getElementById("n7-res-f2").innerText = (F2/1000).toFixed(1) + " kN";
        document.getElementById("n7-res-ft").innerText = ((F1 + F2)/1000).toFixed(1) + " kN";

        draw(H, R);
    }

    function draw(H, R) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 500, 450);
        const scale = 50; const ox = 150, oy = 50;
        const H_px = H * scale;
        const R_px = R * scale;

        // 1. Fluid
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(66, 153, 225, 0.15)";
        ctx.fillRect(ox - 80, oy, 80, H_px + R_px);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#3182ce"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ox - 80, oy); ctx.lineTo(ox, oy); ctx.stroke();

        // 2. Brana
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#2d3748"; ctx.lineWidth = 6;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox, oy);
        ctx.lineTo(ox, oy + H_px);
        ctx.arc(ox + R_px, oy + H_px, R_px, Math.PI, Math.PI/2, true);
        ctx.stroke();

        // 3. Tlak na ravni dio (Trokut)
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5; ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(237, 137, 54, 0.6)";
        for(let i=0; i<=H; i+=0.5) {
            let y = oy + i * scale;
            let pLen = i * 12;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ox - pLen, y); ctx.lineTo(ox, y); ctx.stroke();
        }

        // 4. TOČKE ZA RAVNI DIO
        const g1y = oy + H_px / 2;
        const cp1y = oy + (2/3) * H_px;
        // G1
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ed8936"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ox, g1y, 4, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        // CP1
        ctx.fillStyle = "#e53e3e"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ox, cp1y, 4, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        drawForceArrow(ox + 40, cp1y, ox, cp1y, "#e53e3e", "F1");

        // 5. TOČKE ZA ZAKRIVLJENI DIO
        const centerLX = ox + R_px;
        const centerLY = oy + H_px;
        // G2 (Težište luka - na cca 45 deg)
        const g2x = centerLX + Math.cos(Math.PI*0.75) * R_px;
        const g2y = centerLY + Math.sin(Math.PI*0.75) * R_px;
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ed8936"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(g2x, g2y, 4, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();

        // CP2 (Hvatište - pomaknuto niže, cca 60 deg)
        const cp2_angle = Math.PI * 0.82;
        const cp2x = centerLX + Math.cos(cp2_angle) * R_px;
        const cp2y = centerLY + Math.sin(cp2_angle) * R_px;
        ctx.fillStyle = "#e53e3e"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cp2x, cp2y, 4, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();

        // Sila F2 (Radijalno iz hvatišta)
        const f2_len = 60;
        const f2_endx = cp2x + Math.cos(cp2_angle) * f2_len;
        const f2_endy = cp2y + Math.sin(cp2_angle) * f2_len;
        drawForceArrow(f2_endx, f2_endy, cp2x, cp2y, "#e53e3e", "F2");

        // Labele
        ctx.fillStyle = "#2d3748"; ctx.font = "bold 11px Arial";
        ctx.fillText("RAVNI DIO", ox + 10, oy + 20);
        ctx.fillText("ZAKRIVLJENI DIO", ox + R_px + 10, oy + H_px + R_px/2);
    }

    function drawForceArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
        ctx.font = "bold 12px Arial";
        ctx.fillText(label, x1 + 5, y1);
    }

    hS.oninput = rS.oninput = update;
    update();
})();
</script>
```

### N8: Sila uzgona na cilindrični zatvarač

Arhimedov zakon za zakrivljene plohe definira vertikalnu silu (uzgon) kao težinu istisnute tekućine. Kod vodoravno položenog valjka koji je djelomično uronjen, sila uzgona $F_v$ jednaka je težini vode volumena istisnutog kružnog odsječka.

$$F_v = \rho \cdot g \cdot A_{odsječak} \cdot L$$

Gdje je površina odsječka $A = R^2 \cos^{-1}\left(\frac{R-h}{R}\right) - (R-h)\sqrt{2Rh-h^2}$ za $h \le R$.

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET N8: Fizikalno točan uzgon na cilindar -->
<div id="z-n8-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">🧪 Laboratorij: Arhimedov uzgon na valjku</h4>

    <div style="display: flex; gap: 30px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <!-- Lijeva strana: Vizualizacija -->
        <div style="flex: 1.8; min-width: 400px; position: relative; background: #f0f9ff; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #bee3f8; overflow: hidden; height: 400px;">
            <canvas id="n8-canvas" width="500" height="400" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>

            <div style="position: absolute; bottom: 15px; left: 15px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #3182ce;">
                <b>Submerzijska analiza:</b><br>
                Uron: <span id="n8-status-uron">50%</span><br>
                Stanje: <span id="n8-status-text">Pluta</span>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Desna strana: Kontrole i proračun -->
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 280px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Dubina urona h: <span id="n8-v-h" style="color: #3182ce;">1.00</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="n8-h" min="0" max="2.0" step="0.01" value="1.0" style="width: 100%; cursor: pointer;">

                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Gustoća tijela: <span id="n8-v-rho" style="color: #3182ce;">500</span> kg/m³</label>
                <input type="range" id="n8-rho-body" min="100" max="1500" step="10" value="500" style="width: 100%; cursor: pointer;">
            </div>

            <div style="background: #ebf8ff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 6px solid #3182ce;">
                <div style="margin-bottom: 15px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #2c5282; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;">Istisnuta masa vode:</div>
                    <div id="n8-res-mass" style="font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 900; color: #2b6cb0;">--- kg</div>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #2c5282; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;">Sila uzgona (Fv):</div>
                    <div id="n8-res-fv" style="font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 900; color: #38a169;">--- kN</div>
                </div>
                <div style="margin-top:12px; font-size:0.8rem; color:#334155;">Bilanca sila: <strong id="n8-res-balance">---</strong> kN</div>
            </div>

            <p style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #718096; line-height: 1.5; font-style: italic;">
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 <b>Fizika:</b> Sila uzgona ne raste linearno s dubinom urona jer je poprečni presjek valjka varijabilan. Najbrže raste kada je uronjen do polovice (najveća širina). </p> </div> </div> </div> </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById("n8-canvas"); const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
    const hS = document.getElementById("n8-h"); const rhoS = document.getElementById("n8-rho-body");

    function getSegmentArea(h, R) {
        if (h <= 0) return 0;
        if (h >= 2*R) return Math.PI * R * R;

        // Formula za površinu odsječka: R^2 * acos((R-h)/R) - (R-h)*sqrt(2*R*h - h^2)
        const part1 = R * R * Math.acos((R - h) / R);
        const part2 = (R - h) * Math.sqrt(2 * R * h - h * h);
        return part1 - part2;
    }

    function update() {
        const h = parseFloat(hS.value);
        const rhoB = parseFloat(rhoS.value);
        const R = 1.0; // Radijus 1m
        const rhoW = 1000; const g = 9.81;
        const L = 1.0; // Sirina 1m

        const area = getSegmentArea(h, R);
        const Fv = rhoW * g * area * L;
        const weight = rhoB * g * (Math.PI * R * R) * L;

        document.getElementById("n8-v-h").innerText = h.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById("n8-v-rho").innerText = rhoB;
        document.getElementById("n8-res-mass").innerText = (rhoW * area * L).toFixed(1) + " kg";
        document.getElementById("n8-res-fv").innerText = (Fv/1000).toFixed(2) + " kN";
        document.getElementById("n8-res-balance").innerText = ((Fv - weight)/1000).toFixed(2);

        const uronPer = (area / (Math.PI * R * R) * 100).toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById("n8-status-uron").innerText = uronPer + "%";

        const statusText = document.getElementById("n8-status-text");
        if(Fv >= weight) {
            statusText.innerText = "Pluta (Ravnoteža)";
            statusText.style.color = "#38a169";
        } else {
            statusText.innerText = rhoB > 1000 ? "Tone" : "Djelomično uronjen";
            statusText.style.color = "#e53e3e";
        }

        draw(h, R, Fv, weight);
    }

    function draw(h, R, Fv, weight) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 500, 400);
        const scale = 120; const ox = 250, oy = 200;
        const R_px = R * scale;
        const waterY = oy + R_px - h * scale;

        // 1. Voda
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(49, 130, 206, 0.4)";
        ctx.fillRect(0, waterY, 500, 400 - waterY);

        // Površina vode (valovi)
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, waterY);
        for(let i=0; i<=500; i+=20) {
            ctx.quadraticCurveTo(i+10, waterY - 5, i+20, waterY);
        }
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#3182ce"; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.stroke();

        // 2. Cilindar
        const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(ox - R_px, oy - R_px, ox + R_px, oy + R_px);
        grad.addColorStop(0, "#cbd5e0"); grad.addColorStop(1, "#718096");
        ctx.fillStyle = grad;
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#2d3748"; ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(ox, oy, R_px, 0, Math.PI*2);
        ctx.fill(); ctx.stroke();

        // 3. Submerzijska maska (tamniji dio pod vodom)
        ctx.save();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.rect(0, waterY, 500, 400);
        ctx.clip();
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)";
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ox, oy, R_px, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        ctx.restore();

        // 4. SILE
        const fScale = 0.005;
        // Težina (iz centra)
        drawArrow(ox, oy, ox, oy + weight * fScale, "#e53e3e", "G (Težina)");
        // Uzgon (iz centra potisnutog volumena - pojednostavljeno iz centra)
        if (Fv > 100) {
            drawArrow(ox, oy, ox, oy - Fv * fScale, "#38a169", "Fv (Uzgon)");
        }

        // Oznaka centra
        ctx.fillStyle = "white"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ox, oy, 3, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
        ctx.font = "bold 12px Arial";
        ctx.fillText(label, x2 + 10, y2 + (y2 > y1 ? 0 : 15));
    }

    hS.oninput = rhoS.oninput = update;
    update();
})();
</script>
```


## Dodatni primjeri {.unnumbered}

### Dodatni primjer Z23 — Diferencijalni manometar s morskom vodom {.unnumbered}

Slatka i morska voda struje duž paralelnih horizontalnih cjevovoda povezanih međusobno pomoću manometarske cijevi oblikovane u obliku dvostrukog slova U, prikazano na slici. Potrebno je odrediti razliku tlaka između dotičnih cjevovoda. Prilikom proračuna uzeti vrijednost gustoće morske vode od $1035 \, \text{kg/m}^3$. Odrediti kolika pogreška nastaje zanemarivanja stupca zraka prilikom proračuna.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$\rho_v$ = $1000 \, \text{kg/m}^3$, $\rho_{mv}$ = $1035 \, \text{kg/m}^3$, $\rho_{zr}$ = $1,2 \, \text{kg/m}^3$, $\rho_{Hg}$ = $13600 \, \text{kg/m}^3$, $h_1$ = $0,6 \, \text{m}$, $h_2$ = $0,1 \, \text{m}$, $h_3$ = $0,7 \, \text{m}$, $h_4$ = $0,4 \, \text{m}$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$p_1 - p_2 = ?$; $\Delta p_{gr} = ?$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

Pretpostavke su da je fluid nestlačiv, te da se zanemaruje utjecaj visine stupca zraka.
Postavit ćemo jednadžbu promjene tlaka od spremnika svježe vode (spremnik 1) do spremnika morske vode (spremnik 2):
$$p_1 + \rho_v \cdot g \cdot h_1 - \rho_{Hg} \cdot g \cdot h_2 + \rho_{mv} \cdot g \cdot h_4 = p_2$$

1. **Bez zraka:**
$$p_1 - p_2 = g (\rho_{Hg} h_2 - \rho_{mv} h_4 - \rho_v h_1) = 9,81 \cdot (13600 \cdot 0,1 - 1035 \cdot 0,4 - 1000 \cdot 0,6) = 3394 \, \text{Pa} = \mathbf{3,39 \, \text{kPa}}$$

2. **Sa zrakom (pogreška zanemarivanjem visine stupca zraka):**
$$p_1 + \rho_v \cdot g \cdot h_1 - \rho_{Hg} \cdot g \cdot h_2 - \rho_{zr} \cdot g \cdot h_3 + \rho_{mv} \cdot g \cdot h_4 = p_2$$
$$p_1 - p_2 = g (\rho_{Hg} h_2 + \rho_{zr} h_3 - \rho_{mv} h_4 - \rho_v h_1) = 9,81 \cdot (13600 \cdot 0,1 + 1,2 \cdot 0,7 - 1035 \cdot 0,4 - 1000 \cdot 0,6) = 3402 \, \text{Pa} = \mathbf{3,4 \, \text{kPa}}$$

3. **Pogreška:**
$$\Delta p_{gr} = 3402 - 3394 = 8 \, \text{Pa}$$
$$\Delta p_{gr} = \frac{8}{3402} \cdot 100 = \mathbf{0,2\%}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<div id="widget-z23-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
<style>
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-title { margin:0; font-size:1.42rem; color:#0f172a; }
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:240px; }
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-scene { display:grid; grid-template-columns:0.95fr 1.05fr; gap:14px; margin-bottom:16px; }
    @media (max-width: 860px) { #widget-z23-advanced .z23-scene { grid-template-columns:1fr; } }
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-box { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; }
    #widget-z23-advanced canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-control, #widget-z23-advanced .z23-metric, #widget-z23-advanced .z23-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-control { padding:14px 16px; }
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-control input { width:100%; }
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-metric { padding:14px; }
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
    #widget-z23-advanced .z23-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
</style>

<div class="z23-head">
    <div>
        <div class="z23-kicker">Z23 laboratorij diferencijalnog manometra</div>
        <h4 class="z23-title">Razlika tlaka je suma pozitivnih i negativnih doprinosa po putu kroz fluide</h4>
        <p class="z23-sub">Ovaj zadatak se najbolje razumije kad se ne gleda samo konačni broj, nego lanac doprinosa: živa i zrak povećavaju $p_1-p_2$, dok stupci slatke i morske vode taj iznos smanjuju. Zrak ovdje ostaje mali korekcijski član.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="z23-note">
        <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Lanac</div>
        <div><strong>p₁ - p₂ = ρ_Hggh₂ + ρ_zgh₃ - ρ_mvgh₄ - ρ_vgh₁</strong></div>
        <div>važni su i iznos i predznak svakog člana</div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="z23-scene">
    <div class="z23-box"><canvas id="canvas-z23-manometer" width="420" height="340"></canvas></div>
    <div class="z23-box"><canvas id="canvas-z23-graph" width="520" height="340"></canvas></div>
</div>

<div class="z23-controls">
    <div class="z23-control">
        <label>h₁ slatke vode: <span id="z23-val-h1" style="color:#2563eb;">0.60</span> m</label>
        <input type="range" id="z23-slider-h1" min="0.2" max="1.0" step="0.01" value="0.60" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
    </div>
    <div class="z23-control">
        <label>h₂ žive: <span id="z23-val-h2" style="color:#6b7280;">0.10</span> m</label>
        <input type="range" id="z23-slider-h2" min="0.05" max="0.3" step="0.01" value="0.10" style="accent-color:#6b7280;">
    </div>
    <div class="z23-control">
        <label>h₄ morske vode: <span id="z23-val-h4" style="color:#1d4ed8;">0.40</span> m</label>
        <input type="range" id="z23-slider-h4" min="0.2" max="0.8" step="0.01" value="0.40" style="accent-color:#1d4ed8;">
    </div>
    <div class="z23-control">
        <label style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; margin-bottom:0;">
            <input type="checkbox" id="z23-check-air" checked>
            Uključi mali zračni stupac h₃ = 0.70 m
        </label>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="z23-metrics">
    <div class="z23-metric"><small>Razlika tlaka p₁ - p₂</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z23-res-dp">3.40</span> kPa</strong></div>
    <div class="z23-metric"><small>Bez zraka</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="z23-res-noair">3.39</span> kPa</strong></div>
    <div class="z23-metric"><small>Doprinos zraka</small><strong style="color:#475569;"><span id="z23-res-err">8.2</span> Pa</strong></div>
    <div class="z23-metric"><small>Relativna pogreška</small><strong style="color:#b45309;"><span id="z23-res-per">0.24</span> %</strong></div>
</div>

<div class="z23-explainer" id="z23-explainer"></div>

<script>
(function() {
    const cMan = document.getElementById('canvas-z23-manometer');
    const cGraph = document.getElementById('canvas-z23-graph');
    const ctxM = cMan.getContext('2d');
    const ctxG = cGraph.getContext('2d');
    const slH1 = document.getElementById('z23-slider-h1');
    const slH2 = document.getElementById('z23-slider-h2');
    const slH4 = document.getElementById('z23-slider-h4');
    const chAir = document.getElementById('z23-check-air');
    const rhoFresh = 1000;
    const rhoHg = 13600;
    const rhoAir = 1.2;
    const rhoSea = 1035;
    const h3 = 0.7;
    const g = 9.81;

    function update() {
        const h1 = parseFloat(slH1.value);
        const h2 = parseFloat(slH2.value);
        const h4 = parseFloat(slH4.value);
        const useAir = chAir.checked;
        const dpFresh = rhoFresh * g * h1;
        const dpHg = rhoHg * g * h2;
        const dpAir = (useAir ? rhoAir : 0) * g * h3;
        const dpSea = rhoSea * g * h4;
        const totalDP = dpHg + dpAir - dpSea - dpFresh;
        const noAirDP = rhoHg * g * h2 - dpSea - dpFresh;
        const airErr = rhoAir * g * h3;
        const errPercent = Math.abs(airErr / Math.max(totalDP, 1)) * 100;

        document.getElementById('z23-val-h1').textContent = h1.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z23-val-h2').textContent = h2.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z23-val-h4').textContent = h4.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z23-res-dp').textContent = (totalDP / 1000).toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z23-res-noair').textContent = (noAirDP / 1000).toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z23-res-err').textContent = airErr.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z23-res-per').textContent = errPercent.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z23-explainer').textContent = `Živa daje najveći pozitivan doprinos od ${(dpHg / 1000).toFixed(2)} kPa, zrak dodaje samo ${(dpAir / 1000).toFixed(3)} kPa, a slatka i morska voda zajedno oduzimaju ${((dpFresh + dpSea) / 1000).toFixed(2)} kPa. Zato konačna razlika tlaka iznosi ${(totalDP / 1000).toFixed(2)} kPa, a zanemarivanje zraka ovdje uvodi samo malu pogrešku.`;

        drawManometer(h1, h2, h4, useAir);
        drawGraph([
            { name: 'start p₁', value: 0, color: '#0f172a' },
            { name: '+ρ_vgh₁', value: dpFresh / 1000, color: '#2563eb' },
            { name: '-ρ_Hggh₂', value: (dpFresh - dpHg) / 1000, color: '#6b7280' },
            { name: '-ρ_zgh₃', value: (dpFresh - dpHg - dpAir) / 1000, color: '#94a3b8' },
            { name: '+ρ_mvgh₄ = p₂-p₁', value: (dpFresh - dpHg - dpAir + dpSea) / 1000, color: '#1d4ed8' }
        ], totalDP / 1000);
    }

    function drawManometer(h1, h2, h4, useAir) {
        ctxM.clearRect(0, 0, cMan.width, cMan.height);
        ctxM.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        ctxM.fillRect(0, 0, cMan.width, cMan.height);
        const scale = 150;
        const ox = 70;
        const oy = 60;
        ctxM.lineWidth = 16;
        ctxM.lineCap = 'round';
        ctxM.lineJoin = 'round';

        ctxM.strokeStyle = '#dbeafe';
        ctxM.beginPath();
        ctxM.moveTo(ox, oy);
        ctxM.lineTo(ox, oy + h1 * scale);
        ctxM.lineTo(ox + 90, oy + h1 * scale);
        ctxM.lineTo(ox + 90, oy + h1 * scale - h2 * scale);
        ctxM.lineTo(ox + 180, oy + h1 * scale - h2 * scale);
        ctxM.lineTo(ox + 180, oy + h1 * scale - h2 * scale + h3 * scale);
        ctxM.lineTo(ox + 270, oy + h1 * scale - h2 * scale + h3 * scale);
        ctxM.lineTo(ox + 270, oy + h1 * scale - h2 * scale + h3 * scale - h4 * scale);
        ctxM.stroke();

        ctxM.strokeStyle = '#2563eb';
        ctxM.beginPath();
        ctxM.moveTo(ox, oy);
        ctxM.lineTo(ox, oy + h1 * scale);
        ctxM.stroke();
        ctxM.strokeStyle = '#6b7280';
        ctxM.beginPath();
        ctxM.moveTo(ox, oy + h1 * scale);
        ctxM.lineTo(ox + 90, oy + h1 * scale);
        ctxM.lineTo(ox + 90, oy + h1 * scale - h2 * scale);
        ctxM.stroke();
        ctxM.strokeStyle = useAir ? '#cbd5e1' : 'rgba(203,213,225,0.2)';
        ctxM.beginPath();
        ctxM.moveTo(ox + 90, oy + h1 * scale - h2 * scale);
        ctxM.lineTo(ox + 180, oy + h1 * scale - h2 * scale);
        ctxM.lineTo(ox + 180, oy + h1 * scale - h2 * scale + h3 * scale);
        ctxM.stroke();
        ctxM.strokeStyle = '#1d4ed8';
        ctxM.beginPath();
        ctxM.moveTo(ox + 180, oy + h1 * scale - h2 * scale + h3 * scale);
        ctxM.lineTo(ox + 270, oy + h1 * scale - h2 * scale + h3 * scale);
        ctxM.lineTo(ox + 270, oy + h1 * scale - h2 * scale + h3 * scale - h4 * scale);
        ctxM.stroke();

        ctxM.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctxM.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctxM.fillText('p₁', ox - 26, oy + 4);
        ctxM.fillText('p₂', ox + 286, oy + h1 * scale - h2 * scale + h3 * scale - h4 * scale + 4);
        ctxM.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctxM.fillText('slatka voda', ox - 8, oy + h1 * scale + 24);
        ctxM.fillText('živa', ox + 85, oy + h1 * scale + 24);
        ctxM.fillText('zrak', ox + 155, oy + 24);
        ctxM.fillText('morska voda', ox + 236, oy + h1 * scale - h2 * scale + h3 * scale + 24);
    }

    function drawGraph(points, totalDP) {
        ctxG.clearRect(0, 0, cGraph.width, cGraph.height);
        ctxG.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        ctxG.fillRect(0, 0, cGraph.width, cGraph.height);
        const padX = 52;
        const baseY = 170;
        const segW = 98;
        const maxAbs = Math.max(6, ...points.map((point) => Math.abs(point.value)));
        const scaleY = 100 / maxAbs;

        ctxG.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctxG.setLineDash([6, 5]);
        ctxG.beginPath();
        ctxG.moveTo(20, baseY);
        ctxG.lineTo(cGraph.width - 20, baseY);
        ctxG.stroke();
        ctxG.setLineDash([]);

        for (let index = 0; index < points.length - 1; index += 1) {
            const x1 = padX + index * segW;
            const x2 = padX + (index + 1) * segW;
            const y1 = baseY - points[index].value * scaleY;
            const y2 = baseY - points[index + 1].value * scaleY;
            ctxG.strokeStyle = points[index + 1].color;
            ctxG.lineWidth = 4;
            ctxG.beginPath();
            ctxG.moveTo(x1, y1);
            ctxG.lineTo(x2, y2);
            ctxG.stroke();
            ctxG.fillStyle = points[index + 1].color;
            ctxG.beginPath();
            ctxG.arc(x2, y2, 4.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctxG.fill();
            ctxG.fillStyle = '#475569';
            ctxG.font = '11px Inter';
            ctxG.fillText(points[index + 1].name, x1 - 6, 28 + index * 18);
        }
        ctxG.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctxG.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctxG.fillText(`konačno: p₁ - p₂ = ${totalDP.toFixed(2)} kPa`, 52, 24);
    }

    [slH1, slH2, slH4].forEach((slider) => slider.addEventListener('input', update));
    chAir.addEventListener('change', update);
    update();
})();
</script>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Diferencijalni manometri koriste promjene tlaka kroz stupce različitih fluida. Gustoća zraka je toliko mala naspram gustoće tekućina da se njezin utjecaj na ukupnu razliku tlaka često može zanemariti.
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

<hr class='zadatak-sep'>

### Dodatni primjer Z26 — Nagnuti živin manometar {.unnumbered}

Dva spremnika vode međusobno su povezana putem živinog manometra sa cijevima položenima pod kutom $\alpha$ spram horizontalne osi, prikazano na slici. Ukoliko razlika tlaka između spremnika A i B iznosi 20 kPa, potrebno je odrediti visinu $h$ i kut $\alpha$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$a$ = $0,268 \, \text{m}$, $\Delta p_{A-B}$ = $20 \, \text{kPa}$, $\bar{\rho}_{Hg}$ = $13,6$, $\rho_v$ = $1000 \, \text{kg/m}^3$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$\alpha = ?$; $h = ?$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

Pretpostavka je da su tekućine nestlačive. Postavljanjem jednadžbe promjene tlaka polazeći od spremnika A preko cijevi do spremnika B dobivamo:
$$p_A + \rho_v \cdot g \cdot h + \rho_{Hg} \cdot g \cdot 2h - \rho_v \cdot g \cdot h = p_B$$
$$2 \cdot \rho_{Hg} \cdot g \cdot h = p_B - p_A$$

1. **Visina:**
$$h = \frac{p_B - p_A}{2 \cdot \rho_{Hg} \cdot g} = \frac{20000}{2 \cdot 13600 \cdot 9,81} = \mathbf{0,075 \, \text{m}}$$

2. **Gustoća žive:**
$$\rho_{Hg} = \bar{\rho}_{Hg} \cdot \rho_v = 13,6 \cdot 1000 = 13600 \, \text{kg/m}^3$$

3. **Kut:**
Iz geometrije zadanih cijevi:
$$\sin\alpha = \frac{2h}{a} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,075}{0,268} = 0,56 \implies \alpha = \text{arcsin } 0,56 = \mathbf{34^\circ}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<div id="widget-z26-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <div class="z26-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z26-kicker">Z26 laboratorij osjetljivosti</div>
            <h4 class="z26-title">Nagnuta cijev pretvara mali vertikalni pomak u veći pomak po skali</h4>
            <p class="z26-sub">Hidrostatska razlika tlaka i dalje određuje samo vertikalni pomak $2h$, ali nagnuta cijev taj mali pomak rasteže po duljini cijevi. Zato je studentu ovdje važno vidjeti razliku između stvarnog hidrostatskog pomaka i mjernog pomaka po nagnutoj skali.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z26-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Veza</div>
            <div><strong>2ρ_Hgg h = Δp</strong></div>
            <div><strong>sin α = 2h / L</strong></div>
            <div>veći L -> osjetljivija skala</div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z26-scene"><canvas id="canvas-z26-manometer" width="900" height="360"></canvas></div>
    <div class="z26-controls">
        <div class="z26-control">
            <label>Diferencijalni tlak Δp: <span id="z26-val-p" style="color:#2563eb;">20</span> kPa</label>
            <input type="range" id="z26-slider-p" min="5" max="50" step="1" value="20" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div class="z26-control">
            <label>Duljina cijevi L: <span id="z26-val-L" style="color:#dc2626;">0.27</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z26-slider-L" min="0.16" max="0.6" step="0.01" value="0.27" style="accent-color:#dc2626;">
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z26-metrics">
        <div class="z26-metric"><small>Vertikalni pomak h</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z26-res-h">0.075</span> m</strong></div>
        <div class="z26-metric"><small>Potreban kut α</small><strong style="color:#dc2626;"><span id="z26-res-alpha">34.4</span>°</strong></div>
        <div class="z26-metric"><small>Faktor osjetljivosti L/2h</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="z26-res-sens">1.77</span>x</strong></div>
        <div class="z26-metric"><small>Pomak po skali</small><strong style="color:#7c3aed;"><span id="z26-res-L-zoom">27.0</span> cm</strong></div>
        <div class="z26-metric"><small>Rezim geometrije</small><strong style="color:#b45309;" id="z26-res-regime">standardni rezim</strong></div>
    </div>
    <div class="z26-explainer" id="z26-explainer"></div>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z26-manometer');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slP = document.getElementById('z26-slider-p');
        const slL = document.getElementById('z26-slider-L');

        function update() {
            const pKpa = parseFloat(slP.value);
            const L = parseFloat(slL.value);
            const rho = 13600;
            const g = 9.81;
            const h = (pKpa * 1000) / (2 * rho * g);
            const ratioRaw = (2 * h) / L;
            const ratio = Math.min(ratioRaw, 1);
            const alpha = Math.asin(ratio);
            const alphaDeg = alpha * 180 / Math.PI;
            const sensitivity = L / (2 * h);
            const clipped = ratioRaw > 1;
            const regimeEl = document.getElementById('z26-res-regime');
            document.getElementById('z26-val-p').textContent = pKpa.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z26-val-L').textContent = L.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z26-res-h').textContent = h.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z26-res-alpha').textContent = alphaDeg.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z26-res-sens').textContent = sensitivity.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z26-res-L-zoom').textContent = (L * 100).toFixed(1);
            if (clipped) {
                regimeEl.textContent = 'granica modela (2h > L)';
                regimeEl.style.color = '#dc2626';
                document.getElementById('z26-explainer').textContent = `Za Δp = ${pKpa.toFixed(0)} kPa i L = ${L.toFixed(2)} m dobiva se 2h/L = ${ratioRaw.toFixed(2)}, sto je iznad geometrijske granice nagnute cijevi. Widget zato prikazuje granicni slucaj α = 90° (maksimalni nagib) i sugerira vecu duljinu cijevi ili manji tlak za realno mjerenje.`;
            } else {
                regimeEl.textContent = 'standardni rezim';
                regimeEl.style.color = '#b45309';
