```{=html}
                document.getElementById('z26-explainer').textContent = `Za diferencijalni tlak ${pKpa.toFixed(0)} kPa vertikalni živin pomak iznosi samo ${h.toFixed(3)} m. No kad je cijev duga ${L.toFixed(2)} m, taj mali pomak odgovara kutu ${alphaDeg.toFixed(1)}° i proteže se po duljini skale, zbog čega je očitanje osjetljivije nego na okomitoj cijevi.`;
            }
            draw(alpha, h, L);
        }

        function draw(alpha, h, L) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const cx = 430;
            const cy = 250;
            const scale = 1200;
            const fullHalf = L * scale / 2;
            const mercuryHalf = (h / Math.max(Math.sin(alpha), 0.001)) * scale;
            const hPx = h * scale;

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#dbeafe';
            ctx.lineWidth = 18;
            ctx.lineCap = 'round';
            ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx - Math.cos(alpha) * fullHalf, cy - Math.sin(alpha) * fullHalf);
            ctx.lineTo(cx, cy);
            ctx.lineTo(cx + Math.cos(alpha) * fullHalf, cy - Math.sin(alpha) * fullHalf);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#6b7280';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx - Math.cos(alpha) * mercuryHalf, cy - Math.sin(alpha) * mercuryHalf);
            ctx.lineTo(cx, cy);
            ctx.lineTo(cx + Math.cos(alpha) * mercuryHalf, cy - Math.sin(alpha) * mercuryHalf);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#ef4444';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx - 220, cy - hPx);
            ctx.lineTo(cx + 220, cy - hPx);
            ctx.moveTo(cx - 220, cy);
            ctx.lineTo(cx + 220, cy);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`h = ${(h * 100).toFixed(1)} cm`, 640, cy - hPx - 10);
            ctx.fillText(`L = ${(L * 100).toFixed(1)} cm`, 640, cy + 28);
            ctx.fillText(`α = ${(alpha * 180 / Math.PI).toFixed(1)}°`, 640, cy + 48);
        }

        [slP, slL].forEach((slider) => slider.addEventListener('input', update));
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Nagnute cijevi povećavaju osjetljivost manometra jer se mala promjena visine ($h$) očituje kao veći pomak duž cijevi ($L$).
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

<hr class='zadatak-sep'>

### Dodatni primjer Z27 — Više-fluidni spremnik i U-cijev {.unnumbered}

Više-fluidni spremnik povezan je sa U-cijevi kao što je prikazano na slici. Za zadane relativne gustoće i visine stupaca fluida, potrebno je odrediti pretlak u točki A. Također je potrebno odrediti visinu stupca žive koja bi prouzrokovala jednak pretlak onome u točki A.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$h_u$ = $0,7 \, \text{m}$, $h_v$ = $0,3 \, \text{m}$, $h_g$ = $0,2 \, \text{m}$, $h_2$ = $0,9 \, \text{m}$, $\bar{\rho}_u$ = $0,9$, $\bar{\rho}_g$ = $1,26$, $\bar{\rho}_{Hg}$ = $13,6$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$p_A = ?$; $h_{Hg} = ?$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

Pretpostavka je da su svi fluidi nestlačivi, a spremnik je otvoren (atmosferski tlak u točki B $p_B = p_{atm}$). Referentna gustoća je gustoća čiste vode $\rho_v = 1000 \, \text{kg/m}^3$.

$$p_A^* = g \cdot \rho_v (\bar{\rho}_u \cdot h_u + \bar{\rho}_v \cdot h_v - \bar{\rho}_g \cdot (h_2 - h_g)) = \mathbf{470 \, \text{Pa}}$$

$$h_{Hg} = \frac{p_A^*}{\rho_{Hg} \cdot g} = \frac{470}{13600 \cdot 9,81} = \mathbf{3,53 \, \text{mm}}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<div id="widget-z27-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <div class="z27-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z27-kicker">Z27 laboratorij ekvivalencije</div>
            <h4 class="z27-title">Neki slojevi podižu tlak u A, a desni glicerin ga oduzima</h4>
            <p class="z27-sub">Ključ ovog zadatka nije samo izračunati mali ekvivalentni stupac žive, nego prepoznati da desna grana s glicerinom djeluje suprotnim predznakom od lijevih stupaca ulja i vode. Zato je ovdje presudno pratiti doprinos po slojevima, a ne samo zbrojiti sve visine.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z27-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Jednadžba</div>
            <div><strong>p_A* = ρ_v g (0.9h_u + h_v - 1.26(h₂-h_g))</strong></div>
            <div>lijevi slojevi dodaju</div>
            <div>desni glicerin oduzima</div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z27-scene"><canvas id="canvas-z27-compare" width="900" height="360"></canvas></div>
    <div class="z27-controls">
        <div class="z27-control">
            <label>h_ulje: <span id="z27-val-hu" style="color:#b7791f;">0.70</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z27-slider-hu" min="0" max="1.5" step="0.01" value="0.70" style="accent-color:#b7791f;">
        </div>
        <div class="z27-control">
            <label>h_voda: <span id="z27-val-hv" style="color:#2563eb;">0.30</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z27-slider-hv" min="0" max="1.5" step="0.01" value="0.30" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div class="z27-control">
            <label>h_glicerin u desnoj grani: <span id="z27-val-hg" style="color:#0f766e;">0.20</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z27-slider-hg" min="0" max="0.90" step="0.01" value="0.20" style="accent-color:#0f766e;">
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z27-metrics">
        <div class="z27-metric"><small>Pretlak u točki A</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z27-res-pa">470</span> Pa</strong></div>
        <div class="z27-metric"><small>Ekvivalent živi</small><strong style="color:#6b7280;"><span id="z27-res-hhg">3.5</span> mm</strong></div>
        <div class="z27-metric"><small>Lijevi doprinosi</small><strong style="color:#b7791f;"><span id="z27-res-left">9127</span> Pa</strong></div>
        <div class="z27-metric"><small>Desni glicerin</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="z27-res-right">8657</span> Pa</strong></div>
    </div>
    <div class="z27-explainer" id="z27-explainer"></div>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z27-compare');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slHu = document.getElementById('z27-slider-hu');
        const slHv = document.getElementById('z27-slider-hv');
        const slHg = document.getElementById('z27-slider-hg');
        const h2 = 0.9;

        function update() {
            const hu = parseFloat(slHu.value);
            const hv = parseFloat(slHv.value);
            const hg = parseFloat(slHg.value);
            const rhoHg = 13600;
            const g = 9.81;
            const left = 1000 * g * (0.9 * hu + hv);
            const right = 1000 * g * 1.26 * (h2 - hg);
            const pA = left - right;
            const hHgEquiv = pA / (rhoHg * g);

            document.getElementById('z27-val-hu').textContent = hu.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z27-val-hv').textContent = hv.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z27-val-hg').textContent = hg.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z27-res-pa').textContent = pA.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z27-res-hhg').textContent = (hHgEquiv * 1000).toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z27-res-left').textContent = left.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z27-res-right').textContent = right.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z27-explainer').textContent = `Lijevi stupci ulja i vode zajedno daju ${left.toFixed(0)} Pa, dok desna glicerin-grana oduzima ${right.toFixed(0)} Pa. Zato je konačni pretlak u A ${pA.toFixed(0)} Pa, što odgovara samo ${(hHgEquiv * 1000).toFixed(1)} mm živinog stupca.`;
            draw(hu, hv, hg, hHgEquiv, pA);
        }

        function draw(hu, hv, hg, hHg, pA) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const scale = 150;
            const baseY = 300;
            const leftX = 170;
            const rightX = 520;
            const mercuryX = 760;
            const barW = 90;
            const huPx = hu * scale;
            const hvPx = hv * scale;
            const hgPx = (0.9 - hg) * scale;
            const hHgPx = Math.max(3, Math.abs(hHg) * 1000 * 0.8);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#fbbf24';
            ctx.fillRect(leftX, baseY - huPx, barW, huPx);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#60a5fa';
            ctx.fillRect(leftX, baseY - huPx - hvPx, barW, hvPx);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#1f2937';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.strokeRect(leftX, baseY - 250, barW, 250);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#5eead4';
            ctx.fillRect(rightX, baseY - hgPx, barW, hgPx);
            ctx.strokeRect(rightX, baseY - 250, barW, 250);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#6b7280';
            if (pA >= 0) {
                ctx.fillRect(mercuryX, baseY - hHgPx, 50, hHgPx);
            } else {
                ctx.fillRect(mercuryX, baseY, 50, hHgPx);
            }
            ctx.strokeRect(mercuryX, baseY - 250, 50, 250);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('ulje + voda', leftX - 8, baseY + 24);
            ctx.fillText('glicerin', rightX + 2, baseY + 24);
            ctx.fillText('ekv. živa', mercuryX - 2, baseY + 24);
            ctx.fillText(`p_A = ${pA.toFixed(0)} Pa`, 640, 70);
        }

        [slHu, slHv, slHg].forEach((slider) => slider.addEventListener('input', update));
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Ekvivalentni stupac žive pokazuje koliku bi visinu stupca žive zauzeo tlak koji stvara mješavina drugih fluida. Budući da je živa izrazito gusta, ta visina je obično vrlo mala.
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

<hr class='zadatak-sep'>

### Dodatni primjer Z28 — Solarna jezera (nelinearna gustoća) {.unnumbered}

Solarna jezera su umjetna jezera manjih zapremnina duboka nekoliko metara, a koriste se za pohranjivanje solarne energije. Podizanje zagrijane vode (smanjene gustoće) prema površini sprečava se dodavanjem soli na dnu jezera. Kod uobičajenih izvedbi gradijentnih solarnih jezera, gustoća vode se povećava u gradijentnoj zoni, kao što je prikazano na slici, pri čemu je promjena gustoće zadana izrazom:
$$\rho = \rho_0 \cdot \sqrt{1 + \tan^2 \left(\frac{\pi z}{4 h}\right)}$$
pri čemu je $\rho_0$ gustoća vode pri površini, $z$ vertikalna udaljenost mjerena u negativnom vertikalnom smjeru, dok je $h$ geodetska visina gradijentne zone. Potrebno je odrediti pretlak na donjem rubu gradijentne zone (točka 2). Prilikom proračuna pretpostaviti gustoću površinskog sloja konstantnom.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$h$ = $4 \, \text{m}$, $h_0$ = $0,8 \, \text{m}$, $\rho_0$ = $1040 \, \text{kg/m}^3$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">pretlak $p_2 = ?$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

Pretlak na dnu površinskog sloja (točka 1):
$$p_1 = \rho_0 \cdot g \cdot h_0$$

Pretlak na dnu gradijentne zone (točka 2) dobiva se integracijom:
$$p_2 = p_1 + \int_0^h \rho(z) g dz$$
$$p_2 = p_1 + \rho_0 \cdot g \cdot \frac{4h}{\pi} \cdot \ln(1 + \sqrt{2}) = \mathbf{54 \, \text{kPa}}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<div id="widget-z28-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #widget-z28-advanced .z28-head, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-head, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #widget-z28-advanced .z28-kicker, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-kicker, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z28-advanced .z28-title, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-title, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-title { margin:0; font-size:1.42rem; color:#0f172a; }
        #widget-z28-advanced .z28-sub, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-sub, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
        #widget-z28-advanced .z28-note, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-note, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:230px; }
        #widget-z28-advanced .z28-scene, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-scene, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-scene { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:16px; }
        #widget-z28-advanced canvas, #widget-z29-advanced canvas, #widget-z30-advanced canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
        #widget-z28-advanced .z28-controls, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-controls, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z28-advanced .z28-control, #widget-z28-advanced .z28-metric, #widget-z28-advanced .z28-explainer,
        #widget-z29-advanced .z29-control, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-metric, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-explainer,
        #widget-z30-advanced .z30-control, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-metric, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
        #widget-z28-advanced .z28-control, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-control, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-control { padding:14px 16px; }
        #widget-z28-advanced .z28-control label, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-control label, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
        #widget-z28-advanced .z28-control input, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-control input, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-control input { width:100%; }
        #widget-z28-advanced .z28-metrics, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-metrics, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z28-advanced .z28-metric, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-metric, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-metric { padding:14px; }
        #widget-z28-advanced .z28-metric small, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-metric small, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z28-advanced .z28-metric strong, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-metric strong, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
        #widget-z28-advanced .z28-explainer, #widget-z29-advanced .z29-explainer, #widget-z30-advanced .z30-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
        #widget-z29-advanced .z29-cool { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; width:100%; padding:11px 14px; border-radius:12px; border:1px solid #bfdbfe; background:#eff6ff; color:#1d4ed8; font-weight:800; cursor:pointer; }
    </style>
    <div class="z28-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z28-kicker">Z28 laboratorij gradijenta</div>
            <h4 class="z28-title">Kad gustoća raste s dubinom, tlak više nije linearna funkcija dubine</h4>
            <p class="z28-sub">Najvažnija pouka ovog zadatka nije samo rezultat na dnu, nego to da sonda na većim dubinama osjeća sve gušću slanu vodu. Zato je potrebno promatrati i lokalnu gustoću $ρ(z)$ i kumulativni tlak $p(z)$, a ne samo konačnu vrijednost integrala.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z28-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Ključ</div>
            <div><strong>ρ(z) = ρ₀ sec(πz/4h)</strong></div>
            <div><strong>p(z) = p₁ + ∫ρ(z)g dz</strong></div>
            <div>slani gradijent daje veći tlak od homogenog sloja</div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z28-scene"><canvas id="z28-canvas" width="900" height="360"></canvas></div>
    <div class="z28-controls">
        <div class="z28-control">
            <label>Visina gradijentne zone h: <span id="z28-v-h" style="color:#2563eb;">4.0</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z28-h" min="1" max="6" step="0.1" value="4.0" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div class="z28-control">
            <label>Površinska gustoća ρ₀: <span id="z28-v-rho0" style="color:#0f766e;">1040</span> kg/m³</label>
            <input type="range" id="z28-rho0" min="1000" max="1100" step="5" value="1040" style="accent-color:#0f766e;">
        </div>
        <div class="z28-control">
            <label>Dubina sonde z: <span id="z28-probe-z" style="color:#dc2626;">2.00</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z28-probe" min="0" max="4" step="0.05" value="2.0" style="accent-color:#dc2626;">
            <button id="z28-toggle" class="z29-cool" style="margin-top:10px;">Usporedi s homogenim slojem</button>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z28-metrics">
        <div class="z28-metric"><small>Lokalna gustoća ρ(z)</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="z28-probe-rho">1101</span> kg/m³</strong></div>
        <div class="z28-metric"><small>Tlak na sondi p(z)</small><strong style="color:#dc2626;"><span id="z28-probe-p">30.7</span> kPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z28-metric"><small>Tlak na dnu p₂</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z28-res-p2">54.0</span> kPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z28-metric"><small>Dodatak zbog saliniteta</small><strong style="color:#7c3aed;"><span id="z28-res-extra">9.7</span> kPa</strong></div>
    </div>
    <div class="z28-explainer" id="z28-explainer"></div>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('z28-canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const hS = document.getElementById('z28-h');
        const r0S = document.getElementById('z28-rho0');
        const zS = document.getElementById('z28-probe');
        const toggleBtn = document.getElementById('z28-toggle');
        let compareFlat = false;

        function rhoProfile(z, h, rho0) {
            if (compareFlat) {
                return rho0;
            }
            const theta = Math.PI * z / (4 * h);
            return rho0 / Math.cos(theta);
        }

        function pressureContribution(z, h, rho0) {
            const g = 9.81;
            if (compareFlat) {
                return rho0 * g * z;
            }
            if (z <= 0) {
                return 0;
            }
            const theta = Math.PI * z / (4 * h);
            return rho0 * g * (4 * h / Math.PI) * Math.log((1 / Math.cos(theta)) + Math.tan(theta));
        }

        function update() {
            const h = parseFloat(hS.value);
            const rho0 = parseFloat(r0S.value);
            zS.max = h.toFixed(2);
            const probeZ = Math.min(parseFloat(zS.value), h);
            zS.value = probeZ.toFixed(2);
            const p1 = rho0 * 9.81 * 0.8;
            const rhoZ = rhoProfile(probeZ, h, rho0);
            const pZ = p1 + pressureContribution(probeZ, h, rho0);
            const p2 = p1 + pressureContribution(h, h, rho0);
            const pFlat = p1 + rho0 * 9.81 * h;
            const extra = p2 - pFlat;

            document.getElementById('z28-v-h').textContent = h.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z28-v-rho0').textContent = rho0.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z28-probe-z').textContent = probeZ.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z28-probe-rho').textContent = rhoZ.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z28-probe-p').textContent = (pZ / 1000).toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z28-res-p2').textContent = (p2 / 1000).toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z28-res-extra').textContent = (extra / 1000).toFixed(1);
            toggleBtn.textContent = compareFlat ? 'Vrati slani gradijent' : 'Usporedi s homogenim slojem';
            document.getElementById('z28-explainer').textContent = compareFlat
                ? `U homogenom sloju gustoća ostaje ${rho0.toFixed(0)} kg/m³ na svakoj dubini, pa tlak raste linearno. Zato je tlak na dnu ${(p2 / 1000).toFixed(1)} kPa i nema dodatnog pojačanja zbog saliniteta.`
                : `Na dubini ${probeZ.toFixed(2)} m sonda očitava lokalnu gustoću ${rhoZ.toFixed(0)} kg/m³ i tlak ${(pZ / 1000).toFixed(1)} kPa. Budući da gustoća raste s dubinom, tlak na dnu dostiže ${(p2 / 1000).toFixed(1)} kPa, što je ${(extra / 1000).toFixed(1)} kPa više nego kod homogenog sloja iste površinske gustoće.`;
            draw(h, rho0, probeZ, p2, pFlat);
        }

        function draw(h, rho0, probeZ, p2, pFlat) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            const lakeX = 90;
            const lakeY = 40;
            const lakeW = 320;
            const lakeH = 260;
            const scaleY = lakeH / h;
            const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, lakeY, 0, lakeY + lakeH);
            grad.addColorStop(0, '#dbeafe');
            grad.addColorStop(1, compareFlat ? '#60a5fa' : '#1d4ed8');
            ctx.fillStyle = grad;
            ctx.fillRect(lakeX, lakeY + 40, lakeW, lakeH - 40);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#e0f2fe';
            ctx.fillRect(lakeX, lakeY, lakeW, 40);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#1f2937';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.strokeRect(lakeX, lakeY, lakeW, lakeH);

            if (!compareFlat) {
                for (let i = 0; i < 80; i += 1) {
                    const depth = h * i / 80;
                    const densityShade = Math.min(255, 170 + i);
                    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255,255,255,${0.02 + i * 0.002})`;
                    ctx.fillRect(lakeX + 16 + (i % 5) * 52, lakeY + 42 + depth * scaleY, 8, 2);
                    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(30,64,175,${0.05 + i * 0.006})`;
                    ctx.fillRect(lakeX + lakeW - 18, lakeY + 42 + depth * scaleY, 10, 2);
                    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${densityShade}, ${densityShade}, 255, 0.08)`;
                }
            }

            const probeY = lakeY + 40 + probeZ * scaleY;
            ctx.setLineDash([7, 5]);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#dc2626';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(lakeX - 12, probeY);
            ctx.lineTo(lakeX + lakeW + 12, probeY);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#dc2626';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(lakeX + lakeW + 12, probeY, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();

            const barBase = 770;
            const pressureScale = 0.0032;
            ctx.fillStyle = '#1d4ed8';
            ctx.fillRect(560, 300 - p2 * pressureScale, 70, p2 * pressureScale);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#94a3b8';
            ctx.fillRect(680, 300 - pFlat * pressureScale, 70, pFlat * pressureScale);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(compareFlat ? 'homogeni sloj' : 'slani gradijent', 542, 322);
            ctx.fillText('referentni homogeni', 656, 322);
            ctx.fillText(`p₂ = ${(p2 / 1000).toFixed(1)} kPa`, 548, 30);
            ctx.fillText(`p_flat = ${(pFlat / 1000).toFixed(1)} kPa`, 650, 52);
            ctx.fillText(`ρ(z)`, lakeX + lakeW + 26, lakeY + 52);
            ctx.fillText(`${rhoProfile(probeZ, h, rho0).toFixed(0)} kg/m³`, lakeX + lakeW + 26, lakeY + 72);
        }

        [hS, r0S, zS].forEach((slider) => slider.addEventListener('input', update));
        toggleBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            compareFlat = !compareFlat;
            update();
        });
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

<hr class='zadatak-sep'>

### Dodatni primjer Z29 — Naftovod, spremnik zraka i manometar {.unnumbered}

Naftovod i spremnik zraka volumena $1,3 \, \text{m}^3$ povezani su međusobno manometrom na način kao što je prikazano na slici. Ukoliko spremnik sadrži 15 kg zraka temperature 80°C, potrebno je odrediti apsolutan tlak u naftovodu, kao i promjenu razlike visina $\Delta h_{Hg2}$ koja će nastupiti kada se temperatura u spremniku zraka smanji na 20°C. Pretpostaviti konstantan tlak u naftovodu, volumen zraka u manometru zanemariti zbog relativno niskog udjela naspram volumena spremnika.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$V_z$ = $1,3 \, \text{m}^3$, $m_z$ = $15 \, \text{kg}$, $T_{z1}$ = $80^\circ\text{C}$, $T_{z2}$ = $20^\circ\text{C}$, $h_n$ = $0,75 \, \text{m}$, $\Delta h_{Hg}$ = $0,2 \, \text{m}$, $R_z$ = $287 \, \text{J/kgK}$, $\bar{\rho}_{n}$ = $2,68$, $\bar{\rho}_{Hg}$ = $13,6$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">apsolutni tlak $p_n = ?$; promjenu visine $\Delta h_{Hg2} = ?$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

Apsolutni tlak u spremniku zraka dobiva se iz jednadžbe stanja idealnog plina:
$$p_z = \frac{m_z R_z T_z}{V_z}$$

Apsolutni tlak u naftovodu:
$$p_n = \mathbf{1123 \, \text{kPa}}$$

Promjena visine stupca žive uslijed hlađenja zraka na 20°C:
$$\Delta h_{Hg2} = \mathbf{-1,23 \, \text{m}}$$

```{=html}
<div id="widget-z29-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <div class="z29-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z29-kicker">Z29 laboratorij toplinskog pada</div>
            <h4 class="z29-title">Temperatura mijenja tlak plina, a stalni tlak naftovoda zato pomiče živu</h4>
            <p class="z29-sub">Ovdje je najpoučnije pratiti dva koraka: prvo idealni plin u spremniku mijenja tlak prema relaciji $pV=mRT$, a zatim se taj pad tlaka pretvara u novu razliku razina žive uz isti tlak u naftovodu. Zato je korisno razdvojiti tlak plina, tlak naftovoda i trenutno očitanje manometra.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z29-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Lanac</div>
            <div><strong>T ↓ -> p_z ↓</strong></div>
            <div><strong>p_n = const</strong></div>
            <div><strong>Δh_Hg se mijenja da vrati ravnotežu</strong></div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z29-scene"><canvas id="z29-canvas" width="900" height="360"></canvas></div>
    <div class="z29-controls">
        <div class="z29-control">
            <label>Temperatura zraka T: <span id="z29-v-t-badge" style="color:#dc2626;">80</span> °C</label>
            <input type="range" id="z29-t" min="0" max="120" step="1" value="80" style="accent-color:#dc2626;">
        </div>
        <div class="z29-control">
            <label>Referentno stanje</label>
            <div style="font-size:0.82rem; color:#475569; line-height:1.55;">Početno stanje pri 80°C i $h_{Hg}=0{,}20$ m koristi se za određivanje konstantnog apsolutnog tlaka u naftovodu.</div>
            <button id="z29-cool" class="z29-cool" style="margin-top:10px;">Postavi na 20°C</button>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="z29-metrics">
        <div class="z29-metric"><small>Tlak zraka p_z</small><strong style="color:#dc2626;"><span id="z29-res-pz">1.169</span> MPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z29-metric"><small>Tlak naftovoda p_n</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z29-res-pn">1.121</span> MPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z29-metric"><small>Trenutni Δh_Hg</small><strong style="color:#6b7280;"><span id="z29-res-dh">0.20</span> m</strong></div>
        <div class="z29-metric"><small>Promjena od početka</small><strong style="color:#7c3aed;"><span id="z29-res-ddh">0.00</span> m</strong></div>
    </div>
    <div class="z29-explainer" id="z29-explainer"></div>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('z29-canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const tS = document.getElementById('z29-t');
        const coolBtn = document.getElementById('z29-cool');
        const m = 15;
        const R = 287;
        const V = 1.3;
        const rhoHg = 13600;
        const rhoN = 2680;
        const g = 9.81;
        const hN = 0.75;
        const dhRef = 0.2;
        const tRef = 80;

        function pzAt(tempC) {
            return m * R * (tempC + 273.15) / V;
        }

        const pzRef = pzAt(tRef);
        const pn = pzRef - rhoN * g * hN - rhoHg * g * dhRef;

        function update() {
            const temp = parseFloat(tS.value);
            const pz = pzAt(temp);
            const dh = (pz - pn - rhoN * g * hN) / (rhoHg * g);
            const deltaDh = dh - dhRef;

            document.getElementById('z29-v-t-badge').textContent = temp.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z29-res-pz').textContent = (pz / 1e6).toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z29-res-pn').textContent = (pn / 1e6).toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z29-res-dh').textContent = dh.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z29-res-ddh').textContent = deltaDh.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z29-explainer').textContent = `Pri ${temp.toFixed(0)}°C tlak zraka iznosi ${(pz / 1e6).toFixed(3)} MPa. Budući da tlak naftovoda ostaje ${(pn / 1e6).toFixed(3)} MPa, manometar mora prijeći na Δh = ${dh.toFixed(2)} m. U odnosu na početno stanje pri 80°C to je promjena od ${deltaDh.toFixed(2)} m.`;
            draw(temp, dh, pz);
        }

        function draw(temp, dh, pz) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const pipeX = 120;
            const pipeY = 110;
            const tankX = 640;
            const tankY = 70;
            const tankW = 150;
            const tankH = 150;
            const leftLegX = 290;
            const rightLegX = 460;
            const bottomY = 285;
            const leftLevel = 205;
            const rightLevel = leftLevel - dh * 62;

            ctx.fillStyle = '#1f2937';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(pipeX, pipeY, 46, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.fillStyle = '#e2e8f0';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('naftovod', 90, 116);
            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${170 + temp}, ${140}, ${255 - temp}, 0.18)`;
            ctx.fillRect(tankX, tankY, tankW, tankH);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.strokeRect(tankX, tankY, tankW, tankH);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.fillText('spremnik zraka', tankX + 20, tankY + 24);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#dbeafe';
            ctx.lineWidth = 16;
            ctx.lineCap = 'round';
            ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(pipeX + 46, pipeY);
            ctx.lineTo(leftLegX, pipeY);
            ctx.lineTo(leftLegX, bottomY);
            ctx.lineTo(rightLegX, bottomY);
            ctx.lineTo(rightLegX, tankY + tankH / 2);
            ctx.lineTo(tankX, tankY + tankH / 2);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#6b7280';
            ctx.lineWidth = 12;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(leftLegX, leftLevel);
            ctx.lineTo(leftLegX, bottomY);
            ctx.lineTo(rightLegX, bottomY);
            ctx.lineTo(rightLegX, rightLevel);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#111827';
            ctx.lineWidth = 10;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(pipeX + 46, pipeY);
            ctx.lineTo(leftLegX, pipeY);
            ctx.lineTo(leftLegX, leftLevel);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#dc2626';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(leftLegX - 30, leftLevel);
            ctx.lineTo(leftLegX + 30, leftLevel);
            ctx.moveTo(rightLegX - 30, rightLevel);
            ctx.lineTo(rightLegX + 30, rightLevel);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#dc2626';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`Δh = ${dh.toFixed(2)} m`, 340, 92);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.fillText(`p_z = ${(pz / 1e6).toFixed(3)} MPa`, tankX + 10, tankY + tankH + 24);
            ctx.fillText(`p_n = ${(pn / 1e6).toFixed(3)} MPa`, 60, 190);
        }

        tS.addEventListener('input', update);
        coolBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            tS.value = '20';
            update();
        });
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">
